Leviticus11:33 GĂŽntĂť kĂŽa yĂťmba gĂŽkĂŤeja kĂťgwĂŽrwa nĂŽ kiimba gĂŽa kanyamĂť ta kau gĂŽntĂť kĂŽu kĂŽa yĂťmba kĂŽbuĂŽrĂŽte kĂťĂťragwa nĂŽĂťntĂť gĂŽtĂŽĂŽthĂŽrwa kĂŽtheri.
Leviticus11:34 BiakĂťrĂŽa bikeeja gwĂŽtĂŽkĂŽrwa nĂŽ rĂťĂťjĂŽ ruumĂŽte gĂŽntĂťĂťne kĂŽu kĂŽa yĂťmba
Leviticus11:35 GĂŽntĂť kĂŽa yĂťmba kana riiko rĂŽa yĂťmba rĂŽkĂŤeja kĂťgwĂŽrwa nĂŽ kiimba kĂŽa kanyamĂť ta kau
Leviticus11:36 GĂŽntĂť kĂŽonthe kĂŽrĂŽa gĂŽkaaringithagia kiimba gĂŽa tĂťnyamĂť ta tĂťu
Leviticus11:37 Kiimba gĂŽa kanyamĂť ta kau
Leviticus11:38 ĂndĂŽ mbeeĂť ĂŽkĂŤethĂŽrwa ĂŽriindi rĂťĂťjĂŽĂŽne
Leviticus11:39 âMuntĂť akĂŤeja kĂťringithia kiimba kĂŽa nyomoo irĂŽa irĂŽĂŽjawa
Leviticus11:40 MuntĂť akĂŤeja kĂťrĂŽa nyama cia kiimba cia kanyamĂť ta kau
Leviticus11:41 âTĂťnyamĂť tunthe tĂťrĂŽa twĂŽtaĂŽtaga na nthĂŽ tĂťtĂŽbuĂŽrĂŽte kĂťrĂŽĂŽwa nĂŽĂťntĂť tĂťtĂŽtheri.
Leviticus11:42 TĂťnyamĂť tunthe tĂťrĂŽa twikuuragia na nthĂŽ
Leviticus11:43 BĂťtĂŽbuĂŽrĂŽte kĂťrĂŽĂŽjaga tĂťnyamĂť tĂťu bĂťtĂŽkeeje gĂťciĂŽkĂŽra mĂťgiro.
Leviticus11:44 Ni nĂŽ ni MWATHANI MĂťrungu weenu. TontĂť bĂťĂť
Leviticus11:45 NĂŽkwĂŽthĂŽrwa ni nĂŽ ni MWATHANI ĂťrĂŽa waabĂťritĂŽre nthĂŽgĂťrĂťĂťne ya Misri
Leviticus11:46 BĂťu nĂŽbu Waatho bwegiĂŽ nyamĂť cia kĂŽthaka na nyoni
Leviticus11:47 Waatho bĂťu nĂŽ bwa kĂťmenyithanagia nyamĂť irĂŽa ntheru na irĂŽa itĂŽtheri. NingĂŽ nĂŽ bwa kĂťmenyithanagia nyamĂť irĂŽa ibuĂŽrĂŽte kĂťrĂŽĂŽwa na irĂŽa itĂŽbuĂŽrĂŽte kĂťrĂŽĂŽwa.

Leviticus14:3 MĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu akaumaaraga oome ya kambĂŽ nĂŽkenda atega oona kĂŤethĂŽra muntĂť Ăťu nĂŽ ooreete mĂťrimo jĂťmĂťthĂťĂťku jwa gĂŽkoonde.

Leviticus14:13 Nawe akooragĂŽra gatĂťrĂťme kau antĂť arĂŽa atheru arĂŽa nyomoo cia igongwana bia kĂťthiria meeyia na arĂŽa nyomoo cia igongwana bia gwakĂŽĂŽria bia kĂťthiria maatia

Leviticus14:15 RĂŽu mĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu ajĂťkie kĂŽaĂť kĂŽrĂŽa kĂŽa maguta

Leviticus14:17 Najo maguta jarĂŽa jagaatigara rwĂŽĂŽne
Leviticus14:18 Najo maguta jau jangĂŽ jagaatigara rwĂŽĂŽne mĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu agaaka muntĂť ĂťrĂŽa ĂťkĂťtherua mĂťtwe. Ău nĂŽu muntĂť Ăťu ĂťkĂťtherua akaathirĂŽrua meeyia mbere ya MWATHANI.
Leviticus14:19 âMĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu akaaritĂŽra muntĂť ĂťrĂŽa ĂťkĂťtherua kĂŽgongwana gĂŽa kĂťthiria meeyia nĂŽĂťntĂť bwa kĂťtherua kwaawe. MĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu acoke oorage nyomoo ya kĂŽgongwana gĂŽa gwakĂŽĂŽria.
Leviticus14:20 NingĂŽ mĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu akaarita kĂŽgongwana gĂŽa gwakĂŽĂŽria amwe na kĂŽa irio au kĂŽritĂŽroone kĂŽa igongwana. Ău nĂŽu mĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu akaarita kĂŽgongwana gĂŽa kĂťthiria meeyia nĂŽĂťntĂť bwa muntĂť Ăťu.
Leviticus14:21 âĂndĂŽ muntĂť akĂŤeja kwĂŽthĂŽrwa arĂŽ nkĂŽa
Leviticus14:22 NingĂŽ areete nkĂťngĂťthikĂť ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ kana ijĂŽa biĂŽrĂŽ bitĂŽkĂťri. O nkĂťngĂťthikĂť kana kĂŽjea kĂŽritwe kĂŽrĂŽ kĂŽgongwana gĂŽa kĂťthiria meeyia
Leviticus14:23 NtukĂť ya inyaanya nĂŽrĂŽo muntĂť Ăťu akaareeta into biu kĂŽrĂŽ mĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu au mbere ya MWATHANI
Leviticus14:24 Nawe mĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu akaajĂťkia gatĂťrĂťme ga kĂŽgongwana gĂŽa kĂťthiria maatia na kĂŽaĂť kĂŽa maguta
Leviticus14:25 MĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu akooraga kang'ondu kau ga kĂŽgongwana gĂŽa kĂťthiria maatia
Leviticus14:26 MĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu acoke eekĂŽre maguta jamwe rwĂŽĂŽne rwa njara yaawe ya Ăťmotho

Leviticus23:12 O ntukĂť ĂŽĂŽu bĂťkaaritaga imaanja bia nkano birĂŽ kĂŽgongwana kĂŽa gĂťĂťkĂŽĂŽria
Leviticus23:13 NingĂŽ bĂťritage mĂťtu jwa kilo ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ juungeenue na maguta ja nzeituni birĂŽ kĂŽgongwana kĂŽa irio. Yeera rĂŽa kĂŽgongwana kĂŽu rĂŽkeethĂŽrwa rĂŽrĂŽ rĂŽrĂŽega narĂŽo rĂŽngwĂŽrie. BĂťcoke bĂťrite lita ĂŽmwe ya ndibei ĂŽrĂŽ kĂŽgongwana kĂŽa gwĂŽtĂťĂťrĂŽria.

Leviticus23:17 NditagĂŽreeni mĂŽgaate ĂŽĂŽrĂŽa kuuma nja cieenu irĂŽ kĂŽgongwana gĂŽa gĂťĂťkĂŽĂŽria. MĂŽgaate ĂŽĂŽu ĂŽĂŽthagĂŽrwe ĂŽkandi na mĂťtu jĂťmwinyu jwa kilo ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ juungeenue na mĂťtheega jwa kwimbithia. KĂŽgongwana kĂŽu kĂŽĂŽthĂŽrwe kĂŽrĂŽ kĂŽa maketha jeenu ja mbere.
Leviticus23:18 Amwe na mĂŽgaate ĂŽĂŽu
Leviticus23:19 NingĂŽ bĂťritage nthenge ĂŽmwe ya kĂŽgongwana gĂŽa kĂťthiria meeyia na bĂťrite tĂťtĂťrĂťme twĂŽrĂŽ twa mwaka jĂťmwe

Leviticus23:21 O ntukĂť ĂŽĂŽu yongwa bĂťtige kĂťrita ngĂťgĂŽ
Leviticus23:22 RĂŽrĂŽa bĂťgakethaga maketha ja miuunda yeenu bĂťgĂĄakethaga bĂťkinyagia mĂŽthia. NingĂŽ bĂťgaacokageni kĂťringa rĂťĂťa kĂťrĂŽa bĂťketheete. BĂťtigaragĂŽrie nkĂŽa na ageni matigari jarĂŽa jatĂŽkethi. Ni nĂŽ ni MWATHANI MĂťrungu weenu.â

Leviticus23:26 NingĂŽ MWATHANI nĂŽ aarĂŽĂŽrie Musa aramwĂŽra atĂŽrĂŽ
Leviticus23:27 âNtukĂť ya ĂŽkĂťmi ya mweri o jĂťu jwa mĂťgwanja nĂŽyo ntukĂť ya kĂťthirĂŽrua meeyia. NtukĂť ĂŽĂŽu bĂťĂťthĂťranage amwe nĂŽkenda bĂťnthaathayia na muntĂť akĂĄarĂŽĂŽjaga no mbi. NingĂŽ bĂťnditagĂŽre kĂŽgongwana gĂŽa gwakĂŽĂŽria.
Leviticus23:28 NtukĂť ĂŽĂŽu bĂťkĂĄaritaga ngĂťgĂŽ noo ĂŽrĂŽkĂť nĂŽĂťntĂť nĂŽ ntukĂť ya kĂťthirĂŽrua meeyia. NtukĂť ĂŽĂŽu nĂŽyo nkabĂťthirĂŽria meeyia jeenu.
Leviticus23:29 MuntĂť wonthe ĂťrĂŽa ĂťkarĂťma kana akunda gĂŽntĂť ntukĂť ĂŽĂŽu atĂŽtaragwa arĂŽ Ăťmwe wa antĂť baakwa.
Leviticus23:30 NingĂŽ muntĂť ĂťrĂŽa wonthe Ăťkaaritaga ngĂťgĂŽ ntukĂť ĂŽĂŽu; nkamĂťĂťraga aume kĂŽrĂŽ antĂť baakwa.
Leviticus23:31 BĂťtĂŽbuĂŽrĂŽte kĂťritaga ngĂťgĂŽ noo ĂŽrĂŽkĂť

Leviticus23:35 NtukĂť ya mbere bĂťĂťthĂťranage nĂŽkenda bĂťnthaathayia. NtukĂť ĂŽĂŽu bĂťkaritaga ngĂťgĂŽ noo ĂŽrĂŽkĂť.
Leviticus23:36 BĂťnditagĂŽre igongwana bia gwakĂŽĂŽria o ntukĂť o ntukĂť; ntukĂť iu mĂťgwanja. NtukĂť ya inyaanya bĂťĂťthĂťranage nĂŽkenda bĂťnthaathayia na bĂťnditagĂŽra kĂŽgongwana gĂŽa gwakĂŽĂŽria. NtukĂť ĂŽĂŽu bĂťtĂŽbuĂŽrĂŽte kĂťritaga ngĂťgĂŽ noo ĂŽrĂŽkĂť.
Leviticus23:37 âJaja nĂŽjo mambura jarĂŽa bĂťbuĂŽrĂŽte kĂťĂťthĂťranaga amwe nĂŽkenda bĂťnthaathayia na bĂťnditagĂŽra igongwana bia gwakĂŽĂŽria. Igongwana bia irio na igongwana bia gwĂŽtĂťĂťrĂŽria. O kĂŽgongwana kĂŽritagwe ntukĂť ĂŽrĂŽa ĂŽbuĂŽrĂŽte.
Leviticus23:38 Mambura jau jongeeri kĂŽrĂŽ mambura ja sabatĂť jarĂŽa bĂťthithagia o kiumia o kiumia. Igongwana bia kĂťĂťjĂťria mĂŽciĂŽtio na igongwana bia gĂťciendera biongeeri kĂŽrĂŽ birĂŽa bĂťnditagĂŽra bia wĂŽthĂŽre.

KĂŽgongwana gĂŽa kĂťthiria meeyia ja mĂťnaziri gĂŽkaaritwa nĂŽĂťntĂť mĂťnaziri nĂŽ aagĂŽĂŽre mĂťgiro rĂŽrĂŽa muntĂť akuĂŽre arĂŽ akuĂŽ nawe. O ntukĂť ĂŽĂŽu nĂŽyo akaatheria mĂťtwe jwaawe.

Numbers32:33 NĂŽrĂŽo Musa anenkanĂŽĂŽre nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ĂŽrĂŽa yaathagwa nĂŽ mĂťnene Sihoni wa Aamori na ya mĂťnene Ogi wa Bashani kĂŽrĂŽ mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Gadi na mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Rubeni
Numbers32:34 Nacio nchiarwa cia Gadi iraaka ntĂťĂťra ya Diboni
Numbers32:35 na ya Atirothi-shofani
Numbers32:36 na ya Bethinimura na ya Bethiharani. Cionthe ciaarĂŽ ntĂťĂťra ciairigĂŽri na rĂťthingo na igaakwa nkanata cia ng'ondu na mbĂťri.
Numbers32:37 Nacio nchiarwa cia Rubeni iraaka ntĂťĂťra ya Heshiboni
Numbers32:38 na ya Nebo
Numbers32:39 Nacio nchiarwa cia Makiri ĂťrĂŽa mĂťtaana wa Manase nĂŽ ciaithĂťkĂŽĂŽre Gileadi iramĂŽtaa
Numbers32:40 Musa aranenkanĂŽra Gileadi kĂŽrĂŽ nchiarwa cia Makiri ĂťrĂŽa mĂťtaana wa Manase iratĂťĂťra ku.
Numbers32:41 Jairi ĂťrĂŽa waarĂŽ wa mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Manase nĂŽ aithĂťkĂŽĂŽre ntĂťĂťra imwe na araitaa
Numbers32:42 Nobaha areeta arataa ntĂťĂťra ya Kenathi na tĂťtĂťĂťra tĂťrĂŽa twaamĂŽthiĂťĂťkĂŽrĂŽte. Aracoka aramĂŽgarĂťra riĂŽtwa aramĂŽĂŽta riĂŽtwa rĂŽaawe.
Numbers33:1 RĂŽrĂŽa antĂť ba Israeli baumĂŽte Misri batongeeretue nĂŽ Musa na Aaroni
Numbers33:2 Musa nĂŽ aandĂŽkĂŽre mariĂŽtwa ja gĂťntĂť kĂťrĂŽa baambaga kambĂŽ barĂŽ rĂťgendoone o ta ĂťrĂŽa MWATHANI aaugĂŽĂŽte.
Numbers33:3 BaambĂŽrĂŽĂŽrie rĂťgendo antĂť gweetagwa Ramesesi kĂťrĂŽ ntukĂť ya ĂŽkĂťmi na ithaano ya mweri jwa mbere. Nayo nĂŽyo ntukĂť ĂŽrĂŽa yaathingatĂŽte mambura ja Pasaka. ĂĂŽu nĂŽyo ntukĂť baambĂŽrĂŽĂŽrie bareete antĂť ba Misri bonthe babategeete.
Numbers33:4 BeetĂŽre rĂŽrĂŽa Amisri baathikaga aana baao ba iranga barĂŽa MWATHANI aarĂŽ akĂťĂťraga. NĂŽkenda aboonia atĂŽ nĂŽwe ĂťrĂŽ na inya nkĂťrĂťki ya mĂŽrungu yaao ya mĂŽng'uanano.

Numbers33:8 Barauma au mbere ya Pihahirothi baraunĂŽra ĂŽrieene mwanka barakinya rwanda. Nabo beetĂŽrĂŽĂŽre rwanda rwa Ethamu ntukĂť ithatĂť
Numbers33:9 Nabo barauma Mara bareeta barakinya Elimu. Au Elimu nĂŽ kwaarĂŽ na tĂťmiuro twa rĂťĂťjĂŽ ĂŽkĂťmi na twĂŽĂŽrĂŽ

Numbers33:11 Baracoka barauma au Ăria Ătuune bareeta baraamba kambĂŽ rwanda rwa Sini.
Numbers33:12 Baracoka barauma rwanda rwa Sini bareeta baraamba kambĂŽ Dofuka.
Numbers33:13 Barauma au Dofuka bareeta baraamba kambĂŽ Alushi.
Numbers33:14 Barauma Alushi bareeta baraamba kambĂŽ Refidimu. AntĂť au gĂťtaarĂŽ na rĂťĂťjĂŽ rĂťrweega rwa kĂťnyugwa nĂŽ antĂť.
Numbers33:15 Barauma Refidimu bareeta baraamba kambĂŽ rwanda rwa Sinai.

Numbers33:20 Barauma Rimoniperezi bareeta baraamba kambĂŽ Libuna.
Numbers33:21 Barauma Libuna bareeta baraamba kambĂŽ Risa.

Numbers33:23 Barauma Kehelatha bareeta baraamba kambĂŽ kĂŽrĂŽmeene kĂŽa Sheferi.

Numbers33:38 Aaroni mĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu nĂŽ eerĂŽrwe nĂŽ MWATHANI aitie kĂŽrĂŽmeene kĂŽa Hori. KĂťu nĂŽku aakuĂŽrĂŽĂŽre kĂťrĂŽ ntukĂť ya mbere ya mweri jwa ĂŽtaano mwakeene jwa mĂŽrongo ĂŽna kuuma rĂŽrĂŽa antĂť ba Israeli baaumĂŽre Misri.
Numbers33:39 Aaroni aarĂŽ na ĂťkĂťrĂť bwa mĂŽaka ĂŽgana rĂŽa mĂŽrongo ĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na ĂŽthatĂť (123) rĂŽrĂŽa aakuĂŽrĂŽĂŽre kĂŽrĂŽmeene kĂŽa Hori.
Numbers33:40 Aradi mĂťnene wa Kanaani ĂťrĂŽa waatwĂŽre bwa Ăťmotho bwa nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ya Kanaani nĂŽ aigĂŽrue atĂŽ Aisraeli nĂŽ bakuĂŽrĂŽĂŽtie nthĂŽgĂťrĂť yaao.
Numbers33:41 Nabo antĂť ba Israeli nĂŽ baaumĂŽre kĂŽrĂŽmeene kĂŽa Hori bareeta baraamba kambĂŽ Zalimona.

Numbers34:3 Mwanka jwa nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ĂŽĂŽu jwa bwa Ăťmotho jĂťkambagĂŽĂŽria rwanda rwa Zini jĂťgeetania na mwanka jwa nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ya Edomu. Mwanka jĂťu jĂťkethagĂŽrwa jĂťkĂŽambĂŽrĂŽria mĂťthieene jwa ĂŽria rĂŽa ChumbĂŽ bwa gaiti.

Numbers34:15 MĂŽĂŽrĂŽga ĂŽĂŽu yo-ĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na nusu ya mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Manase nĂŽ bathirĂŽtie kĂťjĂťkia rĂťgai rwaao rwa nthĂŽgĂťrĂť rĂťteere rwa bwa gaiti ka mĂťuro jwa Jorodani akuĂŽ na Jeriko.â

Numbers34:18 NingĂŽ bĂťthuure mĂťtongeeria kuuma o mwĂŽrĂŽga wa kĂťbateetheria kĂťgaa nthĂŽgĂťrĂť.
Numbers34:19 MariĂŽtwa jaja nĂŽjo ja antĂť bau: kuuma mwĂŽrĂŽgeene jwa Juda nĂŽ Kalebu mĂťtaana wa Jefune.
Numbers34:20 Kuuma mwĂŽrĂŽgeene jwa nchiarwa cia Simioni nĂŽ Shemueli mĂťtaana wa Amihudi.

Numbers34:24 Kuuma mwĂŽrĂŽgeene jwa nchiarwa cia Efuraimu nĂŽ mĂťtongeeria waao Kemueli mĂťtaana wa Shifutani.
Numbers34:25 Kuuma mwĂŽrĂŽgeene jwa nchiarwa cia Zebuloni nĂŽ mĂťtongeeria waao Elizafani mĂťtaana wa Paranaki.

Numbers34:29 Bau nĂŽbo antĂť barĂŽa MWATHANI aaugĂŽre bagae nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ya Kanaani ĂŽrĂŽ rĂťgai rwa Aisraeli.â
Numbers35:1 Musa arĂŽ bĂťĂťrĂŽĂŽne ya Moabu
Numbers35:2 âĂĂŽra antĂť ba Israeli atĂŽ rĂŽrĂŽa bagaatonya nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ya Kanaani bagaĂŽrwa rĂťgai rwaao nabo bagaĂŽre Alawi ntĂťĂťra. NingĂŽ bagaĂŽrwe gĂťntĂť kĂťrĂŽa kĂťthiĂťrĂťkĂŽrĂŽte ntĂťĂťra iu nĂŽkenda barĂŽĂŽthagia ku.
Numbers35:3 NtĂťĂťra iu bakaagĂŽrwa nĂŽku bagatĂťĂťraga. NingĂŽ barĂŽĂŽthagie ku ng'ombe na ng'ondu na mbĂťri amwe na nyomoo ingĂŽ ciaao cionthe.
Numbers35:4 Ithaka birĂŽa bĂťkaagaĂŽra Alawi biĂŽthĂŽrwe bithiĂťrĂťkĂŽrĂŽte ntĂťĂťra iu
Numbers35:5 NaabuĂŽ bĂťkaathima ithaka biu kĂťthiĂťrĂťkĂŽra ntĂťĂťra; rĂťteere rwa bwa gaiti kilomita ĂŽmwe (1km) na rĂťteere rwa bwa Ăťmotho kilomita ĂŽmwe (1km)
Numbers35:6 BĂťgaĂŽre Alawi ntĂťĂťra ithanthatĂť. MuntĂť ĂťĂťraganĂŽte no amatĂťke agaiciithe ntĂťĂťreene ĂŽmwe ya iu. BĂťcoke bĂťgaĂŽre Alawi ntĂťĂťra ingĂŽ mĂŽrongo ĂŽna na ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ (42).
Numbers35:7 NtĂťĂťra cionthe irĂŽa bĂťkaagaĂŽra Alawi ikeethĂŽrwa irĂŽ mĂŽrongo ĂŽna na inyaanya (48)
Numbers35:8 NtĂťĂťra irĂŽa bĂťkagaĂŽra Alawi nĂŽ irĂŽa ikethagĂŽrwa inenkanĂŽri nĂŽ antĂť bangĂŽ ba Israeli kuumania na ntĂťĂťra irĂŽa bagaĂŽri. MwĂŽrĂŽga jĂťmĂťnene jĂťkaritaga ntĂťĂťra inyingĂŽ na mwĂŽrĂŽga jĂťmĂťnini jĂťkaritaga ntĂťĂťra inkai.â
Numbers35:9 MWATHANI nĂŽ aarĂŽĂŽrie Musa aramwĂŽra atĂŽrĂŽ
Numbers35:10 âĂĂŽra antĂť ba Israeli atĂŽ
Numbers35:11 rĂŽu bĂťthuure ntĂťĂťra irĂŽa muntĂť oomba kĂťmatĂťka ageeta gwiciitha rĂŽrĂŽa ooragana atĂŽkwenda.
Numbers35:12 NtĂťĂťra iu nĂŽcio muntĂť ĂťĂťraganĂŽte oomba gwiciitha atĂŽkeeje kĂťĂťragwa nĂŽ muntĂť Ăťkwenda kwirĂŽĂŽria. MuntĂť ĂťĂťraganĂŽte atĂŽbuĂŽrĂŽte kĂťĂťragwa atĂŽgambĂŽri mbere ya kĂŽĂťthĂťrano kĂŽa antĂť ba Israeli.
Numbers35:13 Nacio ntĂťĂťra iu cia gwiciithagwa ikeethĂŽrwa irĂŽ ithanthatĂť.
Numbers35:14 NtĂťĂťra ithatĂť ciĂŽthĂŽrwe irĂŽ rĂťteere rwa bwa gaiti ka mĂťuro jwa Jorodani na ntĂťĂťra ingĂŽ ithatĂť ciĂŽthĂŽrwe irĂŽ nthĂŽgĂťrĂťĂťne ya Kanaani. Iu nĂŽcio ikethagĂŽrwa irĂŽ ntĂťĂťra cia gwiciithagwa nĂŽ muntĂť rĂŽrĂŽa ooraganĂŽte.
Numbers35:15 NtĂťĂťra iu cio ithanthatĂť nĂŽku muntĂť ĂťĂťraganĂŽte atĂŽkwenda akamatĂťkaga ageeta gwiciitha. MuntĂť Ăťu ĂťĂťraganĂŽte ĂŤethĂŽrwa arĂŽ MĂťisraeli
Numbers35:16 ĂndĂŽ muntĂť akĂŤeja kĂťringa muntĂť ĂťngĂŽ na gĂŽntĂť gĂŽa chuuma
Numbers35:17 MuntĂť akĂŤeja kĂťringa muntĂť ĂťngĂŽ na iiga nawe muntĂť Ăťu ĂťringĂŽrwe agakua

1Kings4:2 Nabo baba nĂŽbo baarĂŽ atongeeria baawe babanene thirikarĂŽĂŽne yaawe: mĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu aarĂŽ Azaria mĂťtaana wa Zadoki. Azaria mĂťtaana wa Zadoki nĂŽwe waarĂŽ mĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu ĂťmĂťnene.

1Kings4:6 Ahishari aarĂŽ mĂťtongeeria wa atumĂŽkĂŽri gĂŽkaro kĂŽa mĂťnene. Adoniramu mĂťtaana wa Abuda aarĂŽ mĂťrĂťngamĂŽĂŽri wa antĂť barĂŽa baritithagua ngĂťgĂŽ kwa inya.
1Kings4:7 NingĂŽ Solomoni nĂŽ aathuurĂŽre antĂť ĂŽkĂťmi na baĂŽrĂŽ na arabaeethia athani ba tĂťthĂŽgĂťrĂť ĂŽkĂťmi tĂťrĂŽa Israeli yaagaanĂŽtue. NgĂťgĂŽ yaao yaarĂŽ kĂťreeta biakĂťrĂŽa na biakĂťnyua kĂŽrĂŽ mĂťnene na nja yaawe kuuma tĂťthĂŽgĂťrĂť tĂťu. O Ăťmwe waao aaretaga marero ja mweri jĂťmwe o mwaka.
1Kings4:8 Jaja nĂŽjo mariĂŽtwa ja athani bau ĂŽkĂťmi na baĂŽrĂŽ na kathĂŽgĂťrĂť karĂŽa o Ăťmwe waao aarĂťngamĂŽrĂŽte: Beni-huri aarĂŽ mĂťtongeeria wa nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ya irĂŽma ya Efuraimu.

1Kings5:14 NingĂŽ araeethia Adoniramu mĂťrĂťngamĂŽĂŽri waao. Nawe nĂŽ aabagaanĂŽrie ikundi bithatĂť bia ngiri ĂŽkĂťmi ĂŽkĂťmi. NakĂŽo o gĂŽkundi gĂŽeetaga kĂťrita ngĂťgĂŽ Lebanoni mweri jĂťmwe
1Kings5:15 NingĂŽ Solomoni nĂŽ aarĂŽ na antĂť ngiri mĂŽrongo ĂŽnaana (80
1Kings5:16 NingĂŽ antĂť bangĂŽ ngiri ithatĂť na magana jathatĂť (3
1Kings5:17 Nabo nĂŽ baajĂŽre maiga jamanene ja goro ja gwaka mĂťsingi jwa kĂŽĂťrĂť kĂťringana na waatho bwa Solomoni.
1Kings5:18 TontĂť bĂťĂť
1Kings6:1 Solomoni aambĂŽrĂŽĂŽrie gwaka kĂŽĂťrĂť kĂŽa MWATHANI
1Kings6:2 Nayo nyomba ĂŽrĂŽa mĂťnene Solomoni aakĂŽĂŽre MWATHANI yaarĂŽ na Ăťraaja bwa mita mĂŽrongo ĂŽthatĂť (30m)
1Kings6:3 NakĂŽo kĂŽarago kĂŽrĂŽa kĂŽaarĂŽ mwariine jwa kĂŽĂťrĂť kĂŽaarĂŽ kĂŽa mita ĂŽkĂťmi (10m) Ăťraaja na mita ithaano (5m) waariĂŽ. TontĂť bĂťĂť
1Kings6:4 Nacio nthingo cia kĂŽĂťrĂť nĂŽ ciaarĂŽ na ndiricha ciaaki na mbaaĂť nacio ndiricha iu ciaarĂŽ inini bwa oome na imbariĂŽ bwa ndeene.
1Kings6:5 Naku ndee oome nteere cio-ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na nyuma ya kĂŽĂťrĂť nĂŽ aakĂŽre nyomba irĂŽ na ngoroba ithatĂť igwatanĂŽte na nthingo. O ngoroba ĂŽmwe yaarĂŽ ya Ăťraaja bwa gwitia bwa ĂŽgĂťrĂť bwa akuĂŽ mita ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na robo.
1Kings6:6 Kanyomba kamwe ka ngoroba ya nthĂŽ kaarĂŽ na waariĂŽ bwa mita ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na nusu (2.5m). Nako ka ngoroba ya gatĂŽgatĂŽ kaarĂŽ na waariĂŽ bwa akuĂŽ mita ithatĂť (3m). Nako ka ngoroba ya ĂŽgĂťrĂť kaarĂŽ ka waariĂŽ bwa mita ithatĂť na nusu (3.5m). TĂťnyomba tĂťtĂť twakari ĂťjĂť nĂŽĂťntĂť ngoroba ya nyomba ĂŽĂŽu yaaki ĂŽrĂŽ na nkathĂŽ ithatĂť ĂŽgĂŽcekeaga o ĂťrĂŽa kĂŽĂťrĂť gĂŽaitagia. Nayo mĂŽarĂŽro ya ngoroba yaamamagĂŽrua nkathĂŽ iu ithatĂť. TontĂť bĂťĂť
1Kings6:7 KĂŽĂťrĂť nakĂŽo gĂŽakĂŽrwe na maiga jarĂŽa jaajĂŽri na jatendererua ĂŽrandiine. TontĂť bĂťĂť
1Kings6:8 Mwari jwa ngoroba ya nthĂŽ jwaarĂŽ rĂťteere rwa Ăťmotho rwa kĂŽĂťrĂť. NingĂŽ nĂŽ kwaarĂŽ na nkathĂŽ cia gwitia ngorobeene ya ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na ya ithatĂť.
1Kings6:9 TontĂť bĂťĂť
1Kings6:10 Nayo nyomba ya ngoroba ithatĂť ĂŽrĂŽa aakĂŽre ndee oome nteere cio-ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na nyuma yaagwatitheenue na kĂŽĂťrĂť na mbaaĂť cia mĂŽtarakwa. Nayo o ngoroba yaarĂŽ ya Ăťraaja bwa mita ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na nusu (2.5m).

1Kings6:14 TontĂť bĂťĂť
1Kings6:15 Nawe nĂŽ aakunĂŽkĂŽre nthingo cia kĂŽĂťrĂť ndeene na mĂŽtarakwa kuuma nthĂŽgĂťrĂť mwanka ĂŽgĂťrĂť. NingĂŽ nĂŽ aakĂťnĂŽkĂŽre nthĂŽgĂťrĂť na mbaaĂť cia mĂŽthithinda.
1Kings6:16 NingĂŽ naarĂŽa mbere ya kĂŽĂťrĂť buru
1Kings6:17 NakĂŽo kĂŽanya kĂŽrĂŽa gĂŽatigarĂŽre kuuma antĂť atheru buru mwanka mwariine kĂŽaarĂŽ kĂŽa Ăťraaja bwa mita mĂŽrongo ĂŽĂŽrĂŽ (20m).
1Kings6:18 NakĂŽo kĂŽĂťrĂťĂťne ndeene mbaaĂť cia mĂŽtarakwa ciathithĂŽtue ikari ta ikiri na ta maĂťa. Nthingo ciaakunĂŽki buru na mbaaĂť cia mĂŽtarakwa ĂťrĂŽa maiga jatĂŽngĂŽonekana.
1Kings6:19 Kanyomba karĂŽa kaagitĂŽrwe arĂŽa mbere buru a kĂŽĂťrĂť tako antĂť atheru buru nĂŽo ĂthandĂťkĂť rĂŽa kĂŽrĂŽkanĂŽro na MWATHANI rĂŽeekĂŽrwe.
1Kings6:20 Nako kanyomba kau kaarĂŽ ka Ăťraaja bwa mita ĂŽkĂťmi (10m) na waariĂŽ bwa mita ĂŽkĂťmi (10m) na mita ĂŽkĂťmi (10m) gwitia bwa ĂŽgĂťrĂť. Nawe arereeria kanyomba kau na thaabu ĂŽntheru. NingĂŽ nĂŽ aatumĂŽĂŽre mbaaĂť cia mĂŽtarakwa gwaka kĂŽritĂŽro kĂŽa igongwana ku.
1Kings6:21 Solomoni arereeria kĂŽĂťrĂť ndeene na thaabu ĂŽntheru
1Kings6:22 Nawe arereeria kĂŽĂťrĂť kĂŽonthe ndeene na thaabu na kinya kĂŽritĂŽro kĂŽrĂŽa kĂŽaarĂŽ antĂť atheru buru.
1Kings6:23 NĂŽ aathithĂŽrie biĂťmbe biĂŽrĂŽ bia mathagu jaĂŽrĂŽ biĂŽtagwa kerubimu na mbaaĂť cia mĂŽthaata
1Kings6:24 O ĂŽthagu rĂŽmwe rĂŽa kerubimu
1Kings6:25 Kinya mathagu jo-jaĂŽrĂŽ ja kerubimu Ăťu ĂťngĂŽ jaarĂŽ ja uraaja bwa mita ithaano (5m). Nabio biĂťmbe biu bio biĂŽrĂŽ nĂŽ biang'uaneene na biang'anana buru.
1Kings6:26 Kerubimu Ăťmwe aarĂŽ wa mita ithaano (5m) gwitia bwa ĂŽgĂťrĂť kinya Ăťu ĂťngĂŽ aarĂŽ na Ăťraaja o ta bĂťu.
1Kings6:27 Nawe areeka kerubimu bau antĂť atheru buru bereekene. Mathagu jaabo jaambaarĂŽte
1Kings6:28 Solomoni arereeria kerubimu iu na thaabu.
1Kings6:29 NakĂŽo kĂŽĂťrĂť bwa ndeene kĂŽragemua na biĂťmbe bia kerubimu na mĂŽkĂŽndĂť na maĂťa.
1Kings6:30 NingĂŽ kinya nthĂŽgĂťrĂť yeereererue na thaabu
1Kings6:31 Naku mwariine jwa antĂť arĂŽa atheru buru areekĂŽra mĂťrango jwaatĂťri gatĂŽgatĂŽ. Naju jwaatumi na mbaaĂť cia mĂŽthaata.
1Kings6:32 Nayo mĂŽari ĂŽragemua na mbicha cia kwaja cia kerubimu na mĂŽtĂŽ ya mĂŽkĂŽndĂť na maĂťa.
1Kings6:33 Naku mwariine jwa kĂŽĂťrĂť areekĂŽra mĂťrango jwa kona inya jĂťtumi na mbaaĂť cia mĂŽthaata.
1Kings6:34 IchunchĂŽ bio-biĂŽrĂŽ bia mĂŽari yo-ĂŽĂŽrĂŽ biaarĂŽ bia gĂťkĂťnja. Nayo yaathithĂŽtue na mbaaĂť cia mĂŽthithinda.
1Kings6:35 Nawe aragemia mĂŽrango ĂŽĂŽu na mbicha cia kwaja cia kerubimu na mĂŽtĂŽ ya mĂŽkĂŽndĂť na maĂťa
1Kings6:36 Solomoni araaka kĂŽarago au mbere ya kĂŽĂťrĂť
1Kings6:37 Na-rĂŽ
1Kings6:38 Naju mwakeene jwa ĂŽkĂťmi na jĂťmwe
1Kings7:1 MĂťnene Solomoni nĂŽ aakĂŽre nyomba yaawe wengwa na aramĂŽĂťjĂťria na mĂŽaka ikĂťmi na ĂŽthatĂť.
1Kings7:2 Nawe araaka nyomba ĂŽnene ĂŽgwĂŽtwa MwitĂť jwa Lebanoni ya Ăťraaja bwa mita mĂŽrongo ĂŽtaano (50m) na waariĂŽ bwa mita mĂŽrongo ĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na ithaano (25m) na mita ĂŽkĂťmi na ithaano (15m) gwitia bwa ĂŽgĂťrĂť. Nayo yaaki na ndwari ithatĂť cia itugĂŽ bia mĂŽtarakwa na
1Kings7:3 ciring'i ya nyomba ĂŽĂŽu yaaki ya mĂŽtarakwa.
1Kings7:4 NingĂŽ nteere cio-ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ cia nthingo nĂŽ kwaarĂŽ na ndiricha ndwari cio ithatĂť
1Kings7:5 Nayo mĂŽari na ndiricha biaathithĂŽtue na mbaaĂť cia kona inya.
1Kings7:6 NingĂŽ nĂŽ aakĂŽre nyomba ĂŽgwĂŽtwa KĂŽbeeri kĂŽ ItugĂŽ. Nayo yaarĂŽ na Ăťraaja bwa mita mĂŽrongo ĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na ithaano (25m) na waariĂŽ bwa mita ĂŽkĂťmi na ithaano (15m). NakĂŽo nĂŽ kĂŽaarĂŽ na kĂŽarago kĂŽagwatĂŽĂŽri na itugĂŽ au mbere yaakĂŽo.
1Kings7:7 NingĂŽ nĂŽ aakĂŽre nyomba ĂŽnene yeetagwa KĂŽbeeri RĂťriga rwa Ănene. NingĂŽ ni yeetagwa Nyomba ya KĂťgambanĂŽra
1Kings7:8 Nyomba yaawe yongwa ya gĂťtĂťĂťra
1Kings7:9 Nyomba iu cionthe o amwe na kĂŽarago kĂŽrĂŽa kĂŽnene ciaaki na maiga ja goro
1Kings7:10 Nayo mĂŽsingi yaaki na maiga ja goro. Najo jaunganĂŽtue maiga ja Ăťraaja bwa mita inya (4m) na jangĂŽ ja mita ithaano (5m).
1Kings7:11 ĂgĂťrĂť rĂŽajo kwaarĂŽ maiga ja goro
1Kings7:12 NakĂŽo kĂŽarago kĂŽa gĂŽkaro kĂŽa mĂťnene na kĂŽarago kĂŽa ndeene ya kĂŽĂťrĂť na kĂŽarago kĂŽrĂŽa kĂŽaarĂŽ mwariine jwa kĂŽĂťrĂť gĂŽaaki na kosi ĂŽmwe ya mĂŽtarakwa o kĂŽrĂŽ kosi ithatĂť cia maiga.
1Kings7:13 MĂťnene Solomoni nĂŽ aatĂťmanĂŽĂŽre mĂťturi wa maturutia weetagwa Hiramu kuuma Tiro.
1Kings7:14 Hiramu aatigĂŽri Ăťtea bĂťu nĂŽ mĂťtigairĂŽ ĂŽthe ĂťrĂŽa waarĂŽ wa kuuma Tiro. Ng'ina wa Hiramu aarĂŽ mwoyo
1Kings7:15 Hiramu nĂŽ oombĂŽre itugĂŽ birĂŽ bia ĂŽturutia
1Kings7:16 Nawe arabiĂťmbĂŽra biongo biĂŽrĂŽ bia ĂŽturutia. O kĂŽongo kĂŽaarĂŽ kĂŽa Ăťraaja bwa mita ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na nusu (2.5m). Nabio biongo biu birarĂŽkĂŽĂŽrwa ĂŽgĂťrĂť rĂŽa itugĂŽ biu.
1Kings7:17 Nawe aragemia biongo bia itugĂŽ biu na nyororo ciĂŽndanĂŽtue.
1Kings7:18 NingĂŽ arabithiĂťrĂťkĂŽria na ndwari ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ cia ĂŽturutia ikari ta mĂŽkukumanga.
1Kings7:19 ItugĂŽ biu biaarĂŽ na biongo biakari ta mpakĂťri na biaarĂŽ bia Ăťraaja bwa akuĂŽ mita ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ (2m).
1Kings7:20 Biongo biu biarĂŽkĂŽĂŽri mĂťthiĂťrĂťkoone jwa itugĂŽ biu na ĂŽgĂťrĂť rĂŽa arĂŽa kwagemetue na nyororo. NingĂŽ kĂŽrĂŽ ndwari ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ irĂŽa ciaarĂŽ o kĂŽongoone
1Kings7:21 RĂŽu Hiramu nĂŽ eekĂŽre itugĂŽ biu bio-biĂŽrĂŽ mbere ya mwari jwa kĂŽĂťrĂť. NakĂŽo kĂŽrĂŽa eekĂŽre rĂťteere rwa Ăťmotho aragĂŽĂŽta Jakini
1Kings7:22 Najo maĂťa jau jakĂťrĂŽĂŽkĂŽrwa ĂŽgĂťrĂť rĂŽa itugĂŽ ngĂťgĂŽ ya itugĂŽ ĂŽrathira.
1Kings7:23 Hiramu nĂŽ aathithĂŽrie gĂŽtangi gĂŽa kĂŽthiĂťrĂťrĂŽ na ĂŽturutia. NakĂŽo kĂŽaarĂŽ kĂŽa akuĂŽ mita ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na nusu (2.5m) kworokera na mita ithaano (5m) kwarama na akuĂŽ mita ĂŽkĂťmi na ithaano (15m) kĂťthiĂťrĂťka.
1Kings7:24 Naju mĂťromo jwa gĂŽtangi ndee bwa oome jwaagemetue na ndwari ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ cia ikiri bia ĂŽturutia. Nabio ikiri biu biombanĂŽrĂŽtue rĂŽmwe na gĂŽtangi.
1Kings7:25 NakĂŽo gĂŽtangi kĂŽu gĂŽakarĂŽrĂŽte ndeegwa ĂŽkĂťmi na ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ cia ĂŽturutia itegeete bwa oome. TontĂť bĂťĂť
1Kings7:26 GĂŽtangi kĂŽathithĂŽtue na rĂťthingo rwa Ăťmatu bwa centimita inyanya (8cm). MĂťromo jwaakĂŽo jwaathithĂŽtue ta jwa gĂŽkombe jwikĂťmĂŽte bwa oome ta mĂťromo jwa nyongĂť. GĂŽtangi kĂŽu kĂŽaarĂŽ kĂŽa lita ngiri mĂŽrongo ĂŽna (40
1Kings7:27 NingĂŽ Hiramu nĂŽ aathithĂŽrie ngaarĂŽ ĂŽkĂťmi cia gĂťkururia cia ĂŽturutia
1Kings7:28 NgaarĂŽ iu ciaathithĂŽtue ĂťjĂť: Ciaaki na gĂŽkongoro kĂŽa ĂŽturutia nteere na nthĂŽ na gĂŽkarĂŽkĂŽrwa ĂŽgĂťrĂť rĂŽa bureemu cia ĂŽturutia.
1Kings7:29 Naku nĂŽ kwaarĂŽ na mĂŽng'uanano ya ngatĂťnyi na ya ndeegwa na ya kerubimu gĂŽkongoroone kĂŽu. NingĂŽ o bureemuune iu nĂŽ kwombi maĂťa jarigiceene rungu na ĂŽgĂťrĂť rĂŽa ngatĂťnyi na ndeegwa iu.
1Kings7:30 NingĂŽ o ngaarĂŽ yaarĂŽ na magĂťrĂť jana ja ĂŽturutia jaagwatithanĂŽtue na chuuma ya ĂŽturutia. Naku mĂŽthieene yo ĂŽna ya ngaarĂŽ nĂŽ kwaarĂŽ tĂťtugĂŽ twa ĂŽturutia twaagemetue na maĂťa jaarigicene.
1Kings7:31 ĂgĂťrĂť rĂŽa tĂťtugĂŽ tĂťu nĂŽ kwathithĂŽtue mĂťkang'i jwaarĂŽ jwa nusu mita gwitia (0.5 m) bwa ĂŽgĂťrĂť na centimita ĂŽkĂťmi na inyanya (18cm) kworokera. Nacio nteere ciaaju nĂŽ ciaagemetue na tĂťbicha twa kwaja.
1Kings7:32 Najo magĂťrĂť ja ngaarĂŽ iu jaarĂŽ ja Ăťraaja bwa centimita mirongo ĂŽtantaatĂť na ithanthaatĂť (66cm) na jaarĂŽ rungu rwa gĂŽkongoro. Nayo mĂŽchuuma ĂŽrĂŽa yaagwatithenie magĂťrĂť yombanĂŽrĂŽtue amwe na ngaarĂŽ iu.
1Kings7:33 MagĂťrĂť jau jaathithĂŽtue ta magĂťrĂť ja ngaarĂŽ cia ndwaa. MĂŽchuuma yaacio ĂŽrĂŽa yaagwatithenie magĂťrĂť
1Kings7:34 O ngaarĂŽ yaategeki itugĂŽĂŽne bina o gĂŽtugĂŽ mĂťthieene. Nabio itugĂŽ biombanĂŽrĂŽtue na ngaarĂŽ.
1Kings7:35 ĂgĂťrĂť rĂŽa ngaarĂŽ nĂŽ kwaathiĂťrĂťkirĂŽtue mĂťcibi jwa waariĂŽ bwa robo mita. Natu tĂťtugĂŽ na ikongoro na mĂťcibi biombanĂŽrĂŽtue amwe na o ngaarĂŽ.
1Kings7:36 NingĂŽ arĂŽa kunthe gwatigeere kaanya tĂťtugĂŽĂŽne na ikongoroone biu kwaagemetue na tĂťmĂŽng'uanano twa kerubimu
1Kings7:37 Nawe Ăťu nĂŽu aathithĂŽrie ngaarĂŽ cionthe ikari Ăťmwe na ing'aneene buru.
1Kings7:38 NingĂŽ Hiramu aracoka arathithĂŽria o ngaarĂŽ kĂŽraĂŽ kĂŽaayo. NakĂŽo o kĂŽraĂŽ kĂŽaarĂŽ na waariĂŽ bwa mita ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ (2m)
1Kings7:39 Nawe nĂŽ eekĂŽre ngaarĂŽ ithaano rĂťteere rwa Ăťmotho na ithaano ingĂŽ rĂťteere rwa ĂťrĂŽo rwa kĂŽĂťrĂť. NakĂŽo gĂŽtangi aragĂŽĂŽka koneene ĂŽrĂŽa yaarĂŽ gĂŽtĂŽgatĂŽne kĂŽa rĂťteere rwa gaiti na Ăťmotho bwa nyomba.
1Kings7:40 NingĂŽ Hiramu nĂŽ aathithĂŽrie nyongĂť na iciko na mpakĂťri. RĂŽu Hiramu arathiria ngĂťgĂŽ yonthe ĂŽrĂŽa aaei nĂŽ mĂťnene Solomoni yegiĂŽ kĂŽĂťrĂť kĂŽa MWATHANI.
1Kings7:41 Into bibi bithingatĂŽte nĂŽbio Hiramu aathithĂŽrie: ItugĂŽ biĂŽrĂŽ na biongo biĂŽrĂŽ bikari ta mpakĂťri birĂŽa biarĂŽ ĂŽgĂťrĂť rĂŽa itugĂŽ. Nyororo ciĂŽndanĂŽtue igemetue cia o kĂŽongo. Ndwaari ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ cia mĂŽkukumanga ya ĂŽturutia o kĂŽongoone
1Kings7:42 mĂŽkukumanga magana jana (400)
1Kings7:43 NgaarĂŽ ĂŽkĂťmi. IraĂŽ ĂŽkĂťmi.

1Kings9:7 rĂŽu nkabwĂŽnga buume nthĂŽgĂťrĂťĂťne ĂŽrĂŽa mbweete. NingĂŽ nkeerĂťkĂŽra kĂŽĂťrĂť gĂŽkĂŽ ndaathĂťra kĂŽaa antĂť arĂŽa nkathaathagĂŽrua. Nabo antĂť ba mĂŽgongo ĂŽĂŽu ĂŽngĂŽ bakaamenaga na bathĂťmbagie Aisraeli.
1Kings9:8 NakĂŽo kĂŽĂťrĂť gĂŽkĂŽ gĂŽgakoborangwa kĂŽee ĂŽgaanjo. Nawe ĂťrĂŽa wonthe ĂťgakĂťrĂťkagĂŽĂŽra au ageetaga akĂŽringaga mĂŽkenke nĂŽ kĂťrigara agaciĂťria atĂŽrĂŽ

1Kings9:10 Solomoni aakĂŽre KĂŽĂťrĂť na gĂŽkaro kĂŽa mĂťnene mĂŽaka mĂŽrongo ĂŽĂŽrĂŽ.

1Kings9:15 Solomoni akĂťthiria gwaka kĂŽĂťrĂť na gĂŽkaro kĂŽa mĂťnene agĂŽtumagĂŽra ariti ngĂťgĂŽ ba gĂťkinyĂŽĂŽria nĂŽ aacokere arang'ananĂŽria gĂťntĂť kĂťrĂŽa kweenĂťki rĂťteere rwa ĂťrĂŽo rwa ntĂťĂťra na aramiirigĂŽra na rĂťthingo. NingĂŽ aratumĂŽra antĂť bau ba gĂťkinyĂŽĂŽrua gwaka ntĂťĂťra cia Hazori na Megido na Gezeri.
1Kings9:16 (Farao mĂťnene wa Misri nĂŽ aarĂŽ akwithĂťkĂŽra Gezeri na amĂŽtaa.) Nawe akĂťĂťraga atĂťĂťri baayo

1Kings9:18 na Baalathi na Tamari ĂŽrĂŽa ĂŽrĂŽ rwanda rwa Juda.
1Kings9:19 NingĂŽ arabatumĂŽra gwaka ntĂťĂťra cia gwĂŽka Ăťtonga bwaawe na nkanata cia mbarathi na gĂťntĂť gwa gwĂŽkaga ngaarĂŽ ciaawe cia ndwaa. Nabo nĂŽbo aatumĂŽĂŽre gwaka birĂŽa bionthe eendaga gwaka kĂťu Jerusalemu na Lebanoni na kĂťu kĂťngĂŽ ndeene ya mĂťgongo jwaawe.

2Kings15:30 Hoshea mĂťtaana wa Ela nĂŽ aakunyanĂŽĂŽre Peka mĂťtaana wa Remalia
2Kings15:31 Najo mantĂť jangĂŽ jarĂŽa Peka aathithĂŽrie nĂŽ jaandĂŽki yukuune rĂŽa ngono cia anene ba Israeli.
2Kings15:32 Jothamu mĂťtaana wa Uzia aaere mĂťnene wa Juda mwakeene jwa ĂŽĂŽrĂŽ jwa waathani bwa Peka mĂťnene wa Israeli.
2Kings15:33 Jothamu aaere mĂťnene arĂŽ na mĂŽaka mĂŽrongo ĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na ĂŽtaano. AathanĂŽre arĂŽ Jerusalemu mĂŽaka ĂŽkĂťmi na ĂŽtantatĂť. Ng'ina eetagwa Jerusha
2Kings15:34 NĂŽ aathithĂŽrie mantĂť jaagĂŽrĂŽte meethoone ja MWATHANI o ta jarĂŽa jonthe ĂŽthe Uzia aathithagia.
2Kings15:35 ĂndĂŽ ataathĂťĂťkangĂŽrie gĂťntĂť kĂťrĂŽa mĂťrungu jwa Baali jwaathaathagĂŽrua. AntĂť nabo nĂŽ beetĂŽre na mbere kĂťritĂŽra igongwana ku na kwĂŽthĂŽria ubaani nao. Jothamu nĂŽ aakĂŽre mpingĂŽro ya rĂťgĂťrĂť ya kĂŽĂťrĂť.
2Kings15:36 Najo mantĂť jangĂŽ jonthe jarĂŽa Jothamu aathithĂŽrie nĂŽ jaandĂŽki yukuune rĂŽa ngono cia anene ba Juda.
2Kings15:37 RĂŽrĂŽa aathanaga nĂŽrĂŽo MWATHANI aatĂťmĂŽre Rezini mĂťnene wa SĂŽria na Peka mĂťtaana wa Remalia
2Kings15:38 Jothamu nawe nĂŽ aakuĂŽre na arathikwa mbĂŽrĂŽreene cia anene ntĂťĂťreene ya Daudi. MĂťtaana waawe Ahazi araa mĂťnene
2Kings16:1 Ahazi mĂťtaana wa Jothamu aaere mĂťnene wa Juda mwakeene jwa ĂŽkĂťmi na mĂťgwanja jwa waathani bwa Peka mĂťnene wa Israeli.
2Kings16:2 Ahazi aarĂŽ na ĂťkĂťrĂť bwa mĂŽaka mĂŽrongo ĂŽĂŽrĂŽ
2Kings16:3 ĂndĂŽ we aathingataga mĂŽĂŽtĂŽre ya anene ba Israeli. NingĂŽ kinya nĂŽ aaritĂŽre mĂťtaana waawe arĂŽ kĂŽgongwana kĂŽa gwakĂŽĂŽria athingatĂŽte wĂŽthĂŽre bĂťbĂťthĂťĂťku bwa mĂŽgongo ĂŽrĂŽa MWATHANI eengĂŽĂŽre antĂť ba Israeli.
2Kings16:4 NĂŽ aaritaga igongwana na akaĂŽthĂŽĂŽria ubaani gĂťntĂť kĂťrĂŽa mĂťrungu jwa Baali jwathaathagĂŽrua
2Kings16:5 Rezini mĂťnene wa SĂŽria na Peka mĂťtaana wa Remalia
2Kings16:6 Ăgiiteene rĂŽu nĂŽrĂŽo mĂťnene wa SĂŽria aaithĂťkĂŽĂŽre ntĂťĂťra ya Elathi areenga antĂť ba Juda kuuma ku. Nabo antĂť ba Edomu bareeta ku na nĂŽku batĂťĂťraga mwanka naarua tĂťrĂŽ.
2Kings16:7 Ahazi nĂŽ aatĂťmanĂŽre kĂŽrĂŽ Tigilathi Pileseri
2Kings16:8 NingĂŽ Ahazi nĂŽ aajĂťkĂŽrie fetha
2Kings16:9 MĂťnene wa AsĂŽria areetĂŽkĂŽĂŽria ĂťrĂŽa Ahazi aamĂťĂťrĂŽtie
2Kings16:10 MĂťnene Ahazi nĂŽ eetĂŽre Damaski gĂťtirimana na Tigilathi Pileseri mĂťnene wa AsĂŽria. Ahazi nĂŽ oonere kĂŽritĂŽro kĂŽa igongwana kĂŽrĂŽa kĂŽaarĂŽ kĂťu Damaski. Ahazi aratĂťmĂŽra Uria mĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu mbicha yaakĂŽo na mwakĂŽre jwaakĂŽo jĂťkwonania ĂťrĂŽa Ăťngwa gĂŽakari.
2Kings16:11 Uria mĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu araaka kĂŽritĂŽro o ta kĂŽu athingatĂŽte mbicha ĂŽrĂŽa mĂťnene Ahazi aatĂťmĂŽte arĂŽ ntĂťĂťreene ya Damaski. AagĂŽakĂŽre mbere ya mĂťnene Ahazi acoka kuuma Damaski.
2Kings16:12 RĂŽrĂŽa mĂťnene aakinyĂŽre aumĂŽte Damaski
2Kings16:13 araarĂŽta kĂŽgongwana kĂŽa gwakĂŽĂŽria
2Kings16:14 NakĂŽo kĂŽritĂŽro kĂŽa igongwana kĂŽrĂŽa kĂŽathĂťrĂŽri MWATHANI
2Kings16:15 NingĂŽ Ahazi nĂŽ eerĂŽre Uria mĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu atĂŽrĂŽ
2Kings16:16 MĂťthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu nĂŽ aathithĂŽrie mantĂť jau jonthe o ta ĂťrĂŽa mĂťnene Ahazi aamwĂŽrĂŽte.
2Kings16:17 MĂťnene Ahazi nĂŽ aathĂťĂťkangĂŽrie tĂťgaarĂŽ twa ĂŽturutia tĂťrĂŽa twatumagĂŽrwa kĂŽĂťrĂťĂťne
2Kings16:18 NingĂŽ ararita karĂŽngo karĂŽa gaaki kĂŽĂťrĂťĂťne ga kĂťrĂŽkagĂŽĂŽra gĂŽtĂŽ kĂŽa mĂťnene na arainga njĂŽra ĂŽrĂŽa mĂťnene eetagĂŽĂŽra agĂŽtonya kĂŽĂťrĂťĂťne ntukĂť ya sabatĂť. AathithĂŽrie mantĂť jau nĂŽkenda agwĂŽria mĂťnene wa AsĂŽria.
2Kings16:19 MantĂť jangĂŽ jarĂŽa mĂťnene Ahazi aathithĂŽrie nĂŽ jaandĂŽki yukuune rĂŽa ngono cia anene ba Juda.
2Kings16:20 Ahazi nĂŽ aakuĂŽre na arathikwa mbĂŽrĂŽreene cia anene ntĂťĂťreene ya Daudi. Hezekia mĂťtaana waawe araa mĂťnene
2Kings17:1 Hoshea mĂťtaana wa Ela aaere mĂťnene wa Israeli mwakeene jwa ĂŽkĂťmi na ĂŽĂŽrĂŽ jwa waathani bwa Ahazi mĂťnene wa Juda. Hoshea aathanĂŽre arĂŽ ntĂťĂťreene ya Samaria mĂŽaka kenda.
2Kings17:2 NĂŽ aathithĂŽrie mantĂť jamathĂťĂťku mbere ya MWATHANI
2Kings17:3 Shalimaneseri mĂťnene wa AsĂŽria nĂŽ aaithĂťkĂŽĂŽre nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ya Israeli
2Kings17:4 ĂndĂŽ mĂťnene wa AsĂŽria nĂŽ aatigĂŽre gwĂŽtĂŽkia Hoshea
2Kings17:5 MĂťnene wa AsĂŽria aracoka araithĂťkĂŽra nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ya Israeli yonthe arakinya ntĂťĂťra ya Samaria
2Kings17:6 Mwakeene jwa kenda jwa waathani bwa mĂťnene Hoshea nĂŽrĂŽo Shalimaneseri mĂťnene wa AsĂŽria aataĂŽre ntĂťĂťra ya Samaria. Arathaamia antĂť ba Israeli arabaikia nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ya AsĂŽria; araikia bamwe ntĂťĂťreene ya Hala
2Kings17:7 GwaakarĂŽre Ăťu nĂŽĂťntĂť bwa ĂťrĂŽa antĂť ba Israeli beeĂŽĂŽrie MWATHANI MĂťrungu waao
2Kings17:8 na barathingata nkuagaya cia antĂť ba mĂŽgongo ĂŽrĂŽa MWATHANI eengĂŽre nĂŽkenda antĂť ba Israeli baigwatĂŽra kĂťu
2Kings17:9 Nabo antĂť ba Israeli nĂŽ baathithagia mantĂť na witho jatĂŽagĂŽrĂŽte kĂŽrĂŽ MWATHANI MĂťrungu waao. NĂŽ baaciakĂŽrĂŽte irombero bia mĂŽrungu ya mĂŽng'uanano ntĂťĂťreene ciaao cionthe
2Kings17:10 NingĂŽ nĂŽ beekĂŽre itugĂŽ bia mĂŽrungu ya mĂŽng'uanano ya Baali na Ashera kĂťrĂŽa kunthe baarombagĂŽra na rungu rwa mĂŽtĂŽ ĂŽrĂŽa ĂŽriibĂŽte yonthe.
2Kings17:11 Nabo Aisraeli nĂŽ baaĂŽthagĂŽĂŽria ubaani gĂťntĂť kĂťu kunthe o ta ĂťrĂŽa antĂť ba mĂŽgongo ĂŽrĂŽa MWATHANI aabeengĂŽĂŽre baathithagia. Nabo nĂŽ baathithĂŽrie mantĂť jamathĂťĂťku jaratĂťma MWATHANI athĂťĂťra.
2Kings17:12 Nabo nĂŽ baathaathayia mĂŽrungu ya mĂŽng'uanano ĂŽrĂŽa MWATHANI aabakaanĂŽtie batĂŽkamĂŽthaathagie.
2Kings17:13 NingĂŽ MWATHANI nĂŽ aakaanĂŽtie antĂť ba Israeli na ba Juda na njĂŽra ya iroria birĂŽa bionthe aatĂťmĂŽte akiugaga atĂŽrĂŽ
2Kings17:14 ĂndĂŽ bo nĂŽ baaregere kwathĂŽka
2Kings17:15 NĂŽ baareganĂŽre na mawaatho jaawe na kĂŽrĂŽkanĂŽro kĂŽrĂŽa MWATHANI aathithĂŽtie na beethe. NingĂŽ nĂŽ baareganĂŽre na nkuagaya cia MWATHANI barathingata mĂŽrungu ya mĂŽng'uanano na baraa ba Ăťtheri. Baathingataga mĂŽtĂťĂťrĂŽre ya antĂť ba mĂŽgongo ĂŽrĂŽa yaabathiĂťrĂťkĂŽrĂŽte
2Kings17:16 Bararega kwathĂŽkĂŽra maathana ja MWATHANI MĂťrungu waao na baracoka baraithithĂŽria mĂŽrungu ya mĂŽng'uanano ya njaĂť ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ cia chuuma
2Kings17:17 NingĂŽ nĂŽ baaritaga aana baao barĂŽ igongwana bia gwakĂŽĂŽria. Baracoka baratua kĂťroragĂŽrua na kĂťrĂŽngagĂŽrua baracieejana buru kĂťthithagia mantĂť jamathĂťĂťku mbere ya MWATHANI mwanka arathĂťĂťra nĂŽbo.
2Kings17:18 TontĂť bĂťĂť
2Kings17:19 ĂndĂŽ kinya antĂť ba Juda batoombĂŽre kĂťmenyeera maathana ja MWATHANI MĂťrungu waao. Bo nĂŽ beetĂŽre na mbere kĂťthingata mĂŽĂŽtĂŽre ya antĂť ba Israeli ĂŽrĂŽa baarĂŽ bakwambĂŽrĂŽĂŽria.
2Kings17:20 MWATHANI nĂŽ aaregere nchiarwa cionthe cia Israeli arabakanĂťkia na arabanenkanĂŽra kĂŽrĂŽ anthĂť mwanka aratĂťma beebua bauma kĂŽrĂŽ we.
2Kings17:21 RĂŽrĂŽa MWATHANI aatĂťmĂŽre Israeli yaathĂťkana na Juda
2Kings17:22 AntĂť ba Israeli nĂŽ beetĂŽre na mbere kĂťthithia meeyia jarĂŽa jonthe Jeroboamu aathithagia batigĂťtigana najo
2Kings17:23 mwanka rĂŽrĂŽa MWATHANI aatĂťmĂŽre beebua bauma kĂŽrĂŽ we
2Kings17:24 MĂťnene wa AsĂŽria nĂŽ aajĂťkĂŽrie antĂť kuuma ntĂťĂťreene ya Babiloni
2Kings17:25 ĂndĂŽ kĂŽambĂŽrĂŽĂŽriene kĂŽa ĂťtĂťĂťro bwaao ku
2Kings17:26 MĂťnene wa AsĂŽria nĂŽ eerĂŽrwe atĂŽ antĂť barĂŽa aaikĂŽrie beeta gĂťtĂťĂťra ntĂťĂťreene cia Samaria batiijĂŽ waatho bwa mĂťrungu jwa nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ĂŽĂŽu. TontĂť bĂťĂť
2Kings17:27 NĂŽrĂŽo mĂťnene wa AsĂŽria aaugĂŽre atĂŽrĂŽ
2Kings17:28 TontĂť bĂťĂť
2Kings17:29 ĂndĂŽ antĂť ba gĂťntĂť mwanya mwanya barĂŽa baarĂŽ ku nĂŽ beetĂŽre na mbere kwithithĂŽria mĂŽrungu ya mĂŽng'uanano ya kwaao na kĂťmĂŽĂŽka gĂťntĂť kĂťrĂŽa mĂŽrungu ya mĂŽng'uanano yaathaathagĂŽrua
2Kings17:30 AntĂť ba ntĂťĂťra ya Babiloni baraithithĂŽria mĂťrungu jwa mĂťng'uanano jĂťgwĂŽtwa Sukothi-benothi. Nabo antĂť ba ntĂťĂťra ya Kuthi baraithithĂŽria mĂťrungu jwa mĂťng'uanano jĂťgwĂŽtwa Nerigali. AntĂť ba ntĂťĂťra ya Hamathi baraithithĂŽria mĂťrungu jwa mĂťng'uanano jĂťgwĂŽtwa Ashima.
2Kings17:31 AntĂť ba ntĂťĂťra ya Ava baraithithĂŽria mĂťrungu jwa mĂťng'uanano jĂťgwĂŽtwa Nibihazi na jĂťgwĂŽtwa Taritaki. Nabo antĂť ba ntĂťĂťra ya Sefarivaimu nĂŽ baaritaga aana baao barĂŽ igongwana bia gwakĂŽĂŽria kĂŽrĂŽ mĂťrungu jwa mĂťng'uanano jĂťgwĂŽtwa Adrameleki na jĂťngĂŽ jĂťgwĂŽtwa Anameleki.
2Kings17:32 AntĂť ba ntĂťĂťra iu nĂŽ baathaathayia MWATHANI kinya we. NingĂŽ nĂŽ baathuuraga antĂť mwanya mwanya baao bakaabaeethia athĂŽnjĂŽri-mĂťrungu. AthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu bau baaritagĂŽra igongwana gĂťntĂť kĂťrĂŽa mĂŽrungu ya mĂŽng'uanano yaathaathagĂŽrua.
2Kings17:33 Nabo nĂŽ baathaathayia MWATHANI. ĂndĂŽ nĂŽ beetĂŽre na mbere kĂťthaathayia mĂŽrungu yaao ya mĂŽng'uanano kĂťringana na wĂŽthĂŽre bwa kĂťrĂŽa baumĂŽte.
2Kings17:34 Mwanka naarua tĂťrĂŽ
2Kings17:35 MWATHANI nĂŽ eekĂŽre kĂŽrĂŽkanĂŽro na antĂť ba Israeli arabeera atĂŽrĂŽ
2Kings17:36 ĂndĂŽ buĂŽ nthaathayieni ni MWATHANI
2Kings17:37 AthĂŽkagĂŽreeni mawaatho jaakwa
2Kings17:38 BĂťkĂłrĂŽrua nĂŽ kĂŽrĂŽkanĂŽro kĂŽrĂŽa ndeekanĂŽĂŽre naabuĂŽ. BĂťkĂĄthaathayieni mĂŽrungu ya mĂŽng'uanano.
2Kings17:39 ĂndĂŽ nthaathagieni ni MWATHANI
2Kings17:40 ĂndĂŽ antĂť bau nĂŽ baaregere kwigua
2Kings17:41 antĂť bau
2Kings18:1 Hezekia mĂťtaana wa Ahazi aaere mĂťnene wa Juda mwakeene jwa ĂŽthatĂť jwa waathani bwa Hoshea mĂťnene wa Israeli.
2Kings18:2 Hezekia aarĂŽ na ĂťkĂťrĂť bwa mĂŽaka mĂŽrongo ĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na ĂŽtaano rĂŽrĂŽa aaere mĂťnene
2Kings18:3 Hezekia nĂŽ aathithĂŽrie mantĂť jameega mbere ya MWATHANI o ta ĂťrĂŽa kĂŽĂťjĂťjĂť kĂŽaawe Daudi kĂŽathithagia.
2Kings18:4 NĂŽ aathĂťĂťkangĂŽrie gĂťntĂť kĂťrĂŽa mĂŽrungu ya mĂŽng'uanano yaathaathagĂŽrua
2Kings18:5 Hezekia nĂŽ eetĂŽkĂŽtie MWATHANI
2Kings18:6 TontĂť we nĂŽ aatwĂŽre eetĂŽkĂŽtie MWATHANI buru na ataatiga kĂťmwathĂŽkĂŽra. NĂŽ aatwĂŽre amenyagĂŽĂŽra maathana jarĂŽa MWATHANI aaete Musa.
2Kings18:7 MWATHANI nĂŽ aarĂŽ amwe na Hezekia. MantĂť jonthe jarĂŽa Hezekia aathithagia nĂŽ oombanaga. NingĂŽ nĂŽ aareganĂŽre na waathani bwa mĂťnene wa AsĂŽria na aararega kĂťmĂťtumĂŽkĂŽra.
2Kings18:8 Hezekia nĂŽ aaithĂťkĂŽĂŽre nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ya Afilisti yonthe aramĂŽĂťmba kuuma gatĂťĂťreene karĂŽa kanini mwanka ntĂťĂťra ĂŽrĂŽa nene
2Kings18:9 Mwakeene jwa ĂŽna jwa waathani bwa Hezekia
2Kings18:10 Nyuma ya mĂŽaka ĂŽthatĂť aramĂŽtaa. TontĂť bĂťĂť
2Kings18:11 MĂťnene wa AsĂŽria nĂŽ aataĂŽre Aisraeli arabathaamia arabaikia nthĂŽgĂťrĂťĂťne ya AsĂŽria barĂŽ atae. Araikia bamwe ntĂťĂťreene ya Hala
2Kings18:12 GwaakarĂŽkĂŽre Ăťu nĂŽĂťntĂť Aisraeli nĂŽ baaregere kwathĂŽkĂŽra MWATHANI MĂťrungu waao
2Kings18:13 Mwakeene jwa ĂŽkĂťmi na ĂŽna jwa waathani bwa mĂťnene Hezekia
2Kings18:14 Hezekia mĂťnene wa Juda aratĂťmana ntĂťĂťreene ya Lakishi kĂŽrĂŽ mĂťnene wa AsĂŽria aramwĂŽra atĂŽrĂŽ
2Kings18:15 Hezekia nawe aramĂťnenkera fetha yonthe ĂŽrĂŽa yaarĂŽ kĂŽĂťrĂťĂťne na ĂŽrĂŽa yaarĂŽ mĂŽthithĂťĂťne ya gĂŽkaro kĂŽa mĂťnene.
2Kings18:16 NingĂŽ o ĂŽgiita rĂŽu
2Kings18:17 MĂťnene wa AsĂŽria nĂŽ aatĂťmĂŽre mĂťtongeeria wa njĂťĂťrĂŽ wa ndaracha ya Taritani
2Kings18:18 RĂŽu baratĂťmanĂŽra mĂťnene. ĂndĂŽ barĂŽa beetĂŽre kĂŽrĂŽ bo nĂŽ Eliakimu mĂťtaana wa Hilikia
2Kings18:19 MĂťtongeeria wa mbĂťĂťtĂť ya asikarĂŽ ĂťrĂŽa waarĂŽ na ndaracha ya Rabushake arauga atĂŽrĂŽ
2Kings18:20 ĂrĂŽthĂťgaania biugo bibitheri nĂŽbio bireetaga ĂťĂťmbani ndweene? NĂťĂť ĂťkwigĂŽkĂŽte nandĂŽ tontĂť ĂťkĂťrega kĂťmbathĂŽkĂŽra?
2Kings18:21 AtĂŽrĂŽ
2Kings18:22 NingĂŽ menya ĂťmbĂŽĂŽra atĂŽrĂŽ
2Kings18:23 NandĂŽ rĂŽ
2Kings18:24 NĂŽatĂŽa Ăťkoomba kĂťrwaa na kinya Ăťmwe wa atongeeria ba njĂťĂťrĂŽ ba mwathi waakwa barĂŽa anini buru kĂŤethĂŽra nĂŽ Misri weeteereete ĂŽgĂťteethia na ngaarĂŽ cia ndwaa na eetithia ba mbarathi?
2Kings18:25 NingĂŽ rĂŽ
2Kings18:26 Eliakimu
2Kings18:27 ĂndĂŽ mĂťtongeeria Ăťu wa ndaracha ya Rabushake arabeera atĂŽrĂŽ

2Kings23:3 Nawe mĂťnene ararĂťngama gĂŽtugĂŽĂŽne areekanĂŽra kĂŽrĂŽkanĂŽro na MWATHANI atĂŽ akaathĂŽkagĂŽra MWATHANI

2Kings23:6 NingĂŽ nĂŽ aaritĂŽre gĂŽtugĂŽ kĂŽa mĂťrungu mĂťka jĂťrĂŽa jweetagwa Ashera
2Kings23:7 NingĂŽ nĂŽ aatharĂŽrie tĂťnyomba twa aringi maraya ba arĂťme tĂťrĂŽa twaarĂŽ kĂŽĂťrĂťĂťne. KĂťu nĂŽku aka baatumagĂŽra ndwambaambio cia gĂťtumĂŽra rĂŽrĂŽa bakĂťthaathayia Ashera.
2Kings23:8 Josia nĂŽ aaritĂŽre athĂŽnjĂŽri-mĂťrungu bonthe kuuma ntĂťĂťreene cia Juda kuuma nthĂŽgĂťrĂťĂťne kunthe arabaikia Jerusalemu. Aracoka arathĂťĂťkangia iritĂŽro bia igongwana birĂŽa baatumagĂŽra bakĂŽrita igongwana
2Kings23:9 AthĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu bau baariti ntĂťĂťreene cia Juda na nthĂŽgĂťrĂťĂťne kunthe gĂťtumĂŽka kĂŽĂťrĂťĂťne
2Kings23:10 NingĂŽ mĂťnene Josia nĂŽ aathĂťĂťkangĂŽrie gĂťntĂť kĂťrĂŽa kwaaritagĂŽrwa igongwana nĂŽĂťntĂť bwa mĂŽrungu ya mĂŽng'uanano
2Kings23:11 NingĂŽ nĂŽ aaritĂŽre mbarathi mwariine jwa kĂŽĂťrĂť irĂŽa cieeki nĂŽ anene ba Juda nĂŽĂťntĂť bwa kĂťthaathayia mĂťrungu jwa riĂťa. Mbarathi iu cieeki akuĂŽ na kanyomba ka mĂťtongeeria Ăťmwe weetagwa Nathani-meleki. Josia aracoka araĂŽĂŽthia ngaarĂŽ cia ndwaa ĂŽria ciatĂťmagĂŽrwa kĂťthaathayia mĂťrungu jwa riĂťa.
2Kings23:12 MĂťnene Josia nĂŽ aathĂťkangĂŽrie iritĂŽro bia igongwana birĂŽa anene ba Juda baakĂŽte ĂŽgĂťrĂťgĂťrĂť rĂŽa gĂŽkaro kĂŽa mĂťnene Ahazi. Aracoka arathĂťkangia iritĂŽro bia igongwana birĂŽa mĂťnene Manase aakĂŽte biaragoone bio-biĂŽrĂŽ bia kĂŽĂťrĂť. RĂŽu arathetheranga iritĂŽro biu bia igongwana arabigera KĂŽguuruune kĂŽa Kidironi.
2Kings23:13 NingĂŽ mĂťnene Josia nĂŽ aathĂťĂťkangĂŽrie iritĂŽro bia igongwana birĂŽa mĂťnene Solomoni aakĂŽte bwa gaiti ya Jerusalemu na biaarĂŽ bwa Ăťmotho bwa kĂŽrĂŽma kĂŽa Mizeituni. Au nĂŽo kwathaathagĂŽrua mĂŽrungu ya mĂŽng'uanano tayo: mĂťrungu jĂťmĂťĂťĂŽ jwa mĂťka jĂťrĂŽa jweetagwa Ashitarothi jwa nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ya Sidoni
2Kings23:14 Josia aracoka arathĂťkangia itugĂŽ bia maiga na bia mbaaĂť birĂŽa biaathithĂŽtue birĂŽ mĂťrungu mĂťka jĂťrĂŽa jwĂŽtagwa Ashera. Au itugĂŽ biu biaarĂŽ kĂťrakunĂŽkwa na marĂťitĂť ja antĂť.
2Kings23:15 NingĂŽ Josia nĂŽ aathĂťĂťkangĂŽrie kĂŽritĂŽro kĂŽa igongwana kĂŽrĂŽa gĂŽaaki ntĂťĂťreene ya Betheli nĂŽ mĂťnene Jeroboamu mĂťtaana wa Nebati

2Kings24:2 MWATHANI nĂŽ aamĂťtĂťmĂŽĂŽre ikundi bia atuunyani bia antĂť ba Babiloni na ba SĂŽria na ba Moabu

2Kings25:1 NtukĂť ya ĂŽkĂťmi ya mweri jwa ĂŽkĂťmi mwakeene jwa kenda jwa waathani bwa Zedekia mĂťnene wa Juda
2Kings25:2 Bareeta na mbere kĂťmĂŽcĂŽgĂŽĂŽria mwanka mwakeene jwa ĂŽkĂťmi na jĂťmwe jwa waathani bwa Zedekia.

2Kings25:13 NingĂŽ antĂť ba Babiloni nĂŽ baunangĂŽre itugĂŽ bia ĂŽturutia na ĂŽtangi rĂŽa ĂŽturutia na tĂťgaarĂŽ twa ĂŽturutia tĂťrĂŽa twaarĂŽ kĂŽĂťrĂťĂťne. Baracokia barathĂťĂťkangia ĂŽtangi rĂŽrĂŽa rĂŽa ĂŽturutia. AntĂť bau ba Babiloni barajĂťkia ĂŽturutia rĂŽu barariikia Babiloni.

2Kings25:19 Kuuma kĂŽrĂŽ barĂŽa baatigeere ntĂťĂťreene nĂŽ aagwatĂŽre mĂťtongeeria wa asikarĂŽ bataano barĂŽa baaeejaga mĂťnene kĂŽrĂŽra. NingĂŽ nĂŽ aagwatĂŽre karani wa mĂťtongeeria wa njĂťĂťrĂŽ. Karani Ăťu nĂŽwe weekaga Ăťtari bwa njĂťĂťrĂŽ. Nebuzaradani aracoka aragwata antĂť bangĂŽ mĂŽrongo ĂŽtaantatĂť barĂŽa baarĂŽ ĂŽgweta.

2Kings25:21 MĂťnene wa Babiloni nĂŽ aabaĂťĂťrĂŽre na arabooragĂŽra kĂťu ntĂťĂťreene ya Ribula nthĂŽgĂťrĂťĂťne ya Hamathi. TontĂť bĂťĂť
2Kings25:22 MĂťnene Nebukadineza wa Babiloni nĂŽ aathuurĂŽre Gedalia aramweethia mĂťrĂťngamĂŽĂŽri wa antĂť barĂŽa baatigeere nthĂŽgĂťrĂťĂťne ya Juda batĂŽthaamĂŽĂŽtue. Gedalia aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Ahikamu

2Kings25:28 Evili-merodaki nĂŽ aathithĂŽĂŽrie Jehoiakini mantĂť jameega aramweethia muntĂť wa gĂŽtĂŽĂŽo gĂŽkĂŽnene nkĂťrĂťki ya anene bangĂŽ barĂŽa baarĂŽ kĂŽthamĂŽrioone.

1Chronicles1:1 Adamu aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Sethi
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Mehalaleli. Mehalaleli aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Jaredi;
1Chronicles1:3 Jaredi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Enoki
1Chronicles1:4 Lameki aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Noa. Nawe Noa arĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Shemu
1Chronicles1:5 Ataana ba Jafethi baarĂŽ: Gomeri
1Chronicles1:6 Ataana ba Gomeri baarĂŽ: Ashikenazi
1Chronicles1:7 Ataana ba Javani baarĂŽ: Elishah
1Chronicles1:8 Ataana ba Hamu baarĂŽ: Kushi
1Chronicles1:9 Ataana ba Kushi baarĂŽ: Seba na Havila na Sabuta na Raama na Sabuteka. Raama aarĂŽ na ataana baba: Sheba na Dedani.
1Chronicles1:10 Kushi nĂŽwe waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Nimurodi. NĂŽmurodi nĂŽwe waaere nchamba ya ndwaa nthĂŽgĂťrĂťĂťne.
1Chronicles1:11 Misri aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa antĂť ba Ludimu na Anamimu na Lehabimu na Nafutuhimu
1Chronicles1:12 na Pathirusimu (na Kasiluhimu barĂŽa baaumĂŽre antĂť ba Filisti) na Kafitorimu.
1Chronicles1:13 Ataana ba Kanaani baarĂŽ Sidoni na Hethi. Sidoni nĂŽwe waarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa kĂŽranga.
1Chronicles1:14 Kanaani nĂŽwe waarĂŽ kĂŽĂťjĂťjĂť kĂŽa Ajebusi na Aamori na Agirigashi
1Chronicles1:15 na Ahivi na Aariki na Asini
1Chronicles1:16 na Arivadi na Azemari na Ahamathi.
1Chronicles1:17 Ataana ba Shemu baarĂŽ: Elamu na Ashuri na Aripakishadi na Ludi na Aramu na Uzi na Huli na Getheri na Mesheki.
1Chronicles1:18 Aripakishadi nĂŽwe waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Shela
1Chronicles1:19 Eberi aarĂŽ na ataana baĂŽrĂŽ. Ămwe eetagwa Pelegi (nĂŽkwĂŽthĂŽrwa ĂŽgiiteene rĂŽaawe
1Chronicles1:20 Jokitani nĂŽwe waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Alimodadi na Shelefu na Hazarimavethi na Jera
1Chronicles1:21 na Hadoramu na Uzali na Dikila
1Chronicles1:22 na Ebali na Abimaeli na Sheba
1Chronicles1:23 na Ofiri na Havila na Jobabu. Bau bonthe nĂŽbo baarĂŽ ataana ba Jokitani.
1Chronicles1:24 RĂťrĂŽĂŽjo rwa kuuma Shemu mwanka Abramu nĂŽru rĂťrĂť: Shemu aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Aripakishadi. Aripakishadi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Shela.
1Chronicles1:25 Shela aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Eberi. Eberi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Pelegi. Pelegi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Reu.
1Chronicles1:26 Reu aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Serugu. Serugu aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Nahori. Nahori aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Tera. Tera aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Abramu
1Chronicles1:27 Abramu noo we Abrahamu.
1Chronicles1:28 Ataana ba Abrahamu baarĂŽ: Isaaka na Ishimaeli.
1Chronicles1:29 Nchiarwa cia Ishimaeli ciaarĂŽ: Nebaiothi ĂťrĂŽa waarĂŽ wa kĂŽranga na Kedari na Adibeeli na Mibisamu
1Chronicles1:30 na Mishima na Duma na Massa na Hadadi na Tema
1Chronicles1:31 na Jeturi na Nafishi na Kedema.
1Chronicles1:32 MĂťka wa gwĂŽka wa Abrahamu tawe Ketura aarĂŽ na ataana baba: Zimurani na Jokishani na Medani na Midiani na Ishibaki na Shuha. Jokishani aarĂŽ na aana baĂŽrĂŽ. Nabo nĂŽ Sheba na Dedani.
1Chronicles1:33 Ataana ba Midiani baarĂŽ: Efa na Eferi na Hanoki na Abida na Elida. Iu nĂŽcio ciaarĂŽ nchiarwa cia Ketura.
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahamu nĂŽwe waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Isaaka. Ataana ba Isaaka baarĂŽ EsaĂť na Jakubu.
1Chronicles1:35 Ataana ba EsaĂť baarĂŽ: Elifazi na Reueli na Jeushi na Jalamu na Kora.
1Chronicles1:36 Ataana ba Elifazi baarĂŽ Temani na Omari na Zefi na Gatamu na Kenazi na Timina na Amaleki.
1Chronicles1:37 Reueli nawe aarĂŽ na aana baba: Nahathi na Zera na Shaama na Miza.
1Chronicles1:38 Ataana ba Seiri baarĂŽ: Lotani na Shobali na Zibeoni na Ana na Dishoni na Ezeri na Dishani.
1Chronicles1:39 Nabo ataana ba Lotani baarĂŽ Hori na Homamu. MwarĂŽ wa ng'ina wa Lotani eetagwa Timina.
1Chronicles1:40 Ataana ba Shobali baarĂŽ Aliani na Manahathi na Ebali na Shefi na Onamu. Zibeoni aarĂŽ na ataana baĂŽrĂŽ
1Chronicles1:41 Ana aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Dishoni
1Chronicles1:42 Ataana ba Ezeri baarĂŽ Bilihani na Zaavani na Jaakani. Dishani aarĂŽ na ataana baĂŽrĂŽ
1Chronicles1:43 Baba nĂŽbo anene barĂŽa baathanaga NthĂŽgĂťrĂťĂťne ya Edomu mbere ya Israeli ĂŽtĂŽrambĂŽrĂŽria kwaathwa nĂŽ anene: Nabo nĂŽ Bela mĂťtaana wa Beori kuuma ntĂťĂťreene ya Dinihaba.

1Chronicles2:1 Baba nĂŽbo ataana ba Jakubu: Rubeni na Simioni na Levi na Juda na Isakari na Zebuloni
1Chronicles2:2 Dani na Josefu na Benjamini na Nafutali na Gadi na Asheri.
1Chronicles2:3 Juda aarĂŽ na ataana bataano. Nabo nĂŽ Eri na Onani na Shela. Bau baarĂŽ ba mwekĂťrĂť wa kuuma Kanaani ĂťrĂŽa weetagwa Bathishua. MĂťtaana wa kĂŽranga wa Juda tawe Eri nĂŽ eeĂŽĂŽrie MWATHANI
1Chronicles2:4 Tamari mĂťka wa mĂťtaana araciarĂŽra Juda aana bangĂŽ baĂŽrĂŽ
1Chronicles2:5 Perezi nawe aarĂŽ na ataana baĂŽrĂŽ
1Chronicles2:6 Zera aarĂŽ na ataana bataano
1Chronicles2:7 Akari nawe aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Karami. Akari nĂŽwe waretereete Israeli thĂŽĂŽna ĂŽnene nĂŽĂťntĂť bwa gwĂŽka into birĂŽa aataĂŽte. Nabio nĂŽ birĂŽa biaathĂťrĂŽri MWATHANI.
1Chronicles2:8 Azaria aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Ethani.
1Chronicles2:9 Hezironi nĂŽ aarĂŽ na ataana bathatĂť; Jerahimeeli
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Aminadabu
1Chronicles2:11 Nahashoni aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Salima
1Chronicles2:12 Boazi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Obedi
1Chronicles2:13 Jesii aarĂŽ na ataana baba: ĂťrĂŽa mĂťkĂťrĂť eetagwa Eliabu
1Chronicles2:14 Shimea athingatwa nĂŽ Nethaneli
1Chronicles2:15 Radai athingatwa nĂŽ Ozemu
1Chronicles2:16 Jesii nĂŽ aarĂŽ na aarĂŽ baĂŽrĂŽ; nabo nĂŽ Zeruia na Abigaili. Zeruia aarĂŽ na ataana bathatĂť. Nabo baarĂŽ Abishai
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaili aagĂťrĂŽrwe nĂŽ Jetheri wa kuuma rĂťrĂŽĂŽjoone rwa Ishimaeli. MĂťtaana waao eetagwa Amasa.
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Hezironi. Kalebu nĂŽ aagĂťrĂŽre mĂťka weetagwa Azuba ĂťrĂŽa wamĂťciarĂŽĂŽre mwarĂŽ weetagwa Jeriothi. Azuba aracoka aramĂťciarĂŽra ataana baba. Nabo nĂŽ Jesheri na Shobabu na Aridoni.
1Chronicles2:19 Nyuma ya Azuba agĂťkua
1Chronicles2:20 Huri aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Uri
1Chronicles2:21 Nyumeene Hezironi agĂťkinyia mĂŽaka mĂŽrongo ĂŽtantatĂť nĂŽ aagĂťrĂŽre mwarĂŽ wa Makiri. Makiri aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Gileadi. MwekĂťrĂť Ăťu nĂŽ aaciarĂŽĂŽre Hezironi mwana ĂťgwĂŽĂŽtwa Segubu.
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Jairi. Jairi nĂŽwe waathaga ntĂťĂťra mĂŽrongo ĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na ithatĂť nthĂŽgĂťrĂťĂťne ya Gileadi.
1Chronicles2:23 ĂndĂŽ moonene ja Geshuri na SĂŽria nĂŽ jaĂŽthĂťkĂŽĂŽre ntĂťĂťra mĂŽrongo ĂŽtaantatĂť na baraitaa. NtĂťĂťra iu ciaarĂŽ amwe na ntĂťĂťra ya Havothi-jairi na Kenathi. O amwe na tĂťtĂťĂťra tĂťrĂŽa tĂťngĂŽ twaathiĂťrĂťkĂŽrĂŽte. AntĂť barĂŽa baatĂťĂťraga ntĂťĂťreene nĂŽ baarĂŽ nchiarwa cia Makiri
1Chronicles2:24 Nyumeene Hezironi agĂťkua mĂťtaana waawe Kalebu nĂŽ aagĂťrĂŽre Efiratha mĂťka wa ĂŽthe. MĂťka Ăťu aramĂťciarĂŽra mwana ĂťgwĂŽtwa Ashuri. Ashuri nĂŽwe waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Tekoa.
1Chronicles2:25 MĂťtaana wa Hezironi wa kĂŽranga tawe Jerahimeeli aarĂŽ na ataana baba: wa mbere eetagwa Ramu
1Chronicles2:26 Jerahameeli nĂŽ aarĂŽ na mĂťka ĂťngĂŽ weetagwa Atara. Nawe mĂťka Ăťu aramĂťciarĂŽra mwana weetagwa Onamu.
1Chronicles2:27 MĂťtaana wa Jerahimeeli wa kĂŽranga tawe Ramu

1Chronicles2:49 Nyumeene Maaka aragĂŽa na aana bangĂŽ baĂŽrĂŽ
1Chronicles2:50 Baba kinya bo baarĂŽ nchiarwa cia Kalebu. MĂťtaana wa mbere wa Kalebu eetagwa Huri. Huri nĂŽ aagĂťrĂŽte mwekĂťrĂť ĂťgwĂŽtwa Efiratha. Ataana ba Huri baarĂŽ Shobali ĂťrĂŽa waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Kiriathi-jearimu.
1Chronicles2:51 MĂťtaana wa baĂŽrĂŽ wa Huri aarĂŽ Salima. Salima nĂŽwe waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Bethlehemu. MĂťtaana wa bathatĂť wa Huri eetagwa Harefu. Harefu nĂŽwe waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Bethigaderi.
1Chronicles2:52 Shobali ĂťrĂŽa waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Kiriathi-jearimu nĂŽwe waarĂŽ kĂŽĂťjĂťjĂť kĂŽa antĂť ba Haroe na nusu ĂŽmwe ya antĂť barĂŽa batwĂŽre Menuhothi.
1Chronicles2:53 Shobali no we waarĂŽ kĂŽĂťjĂťjĂť kĂŽa mĂŽĂŽrĂŽga ya antĂť barĂŽa baatwĂŽĂŽre Kiriathi-jearimu
1Chronicles2:54 Salima ĂťrĂŽa waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Bethlehemu nĂŽwe waarĂŽ kĂŽĂťjĂťjĂť kĂŽa Netofathi na Atirothi-bethijoabu na nusu ya antĂť barĂŽa baatĂťĂťraga Manahathi tabo antĂť ba Zora.
1Chronicles2:55 NtĂťĂťreene ya Jebezi nĂŽ gwatĂťĂťraga mĂŽĂŽrĂŽga ya antĂť barĂŽa baaijĂŽ kwaandĂŽka. Nayo mĂŽĂŽrĂŽga ĂŽĂŽu yaarĂŽ ya Atirathi na Ashimeathi na Asukathi. Baba baarĂŽ ba mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Akeni kuuma Hamathi. NĂŽbo baagĂťranĂŽte na nchiarwa cia Rekabu.
1Chronicles3:1 Baba nĂŽbo aana ba Daudi barĂŽa aagĂŽĂŽre rĂŽrĂŽa aarĂŽ ntĂťĂťreene ya Heburoni. Nabo nĂŽ Amoni mĂťtaana waawe wa kĂŽranga. Ng'ina wa Amoni eetagwa Ahinoamu wa kuuma Jezereeli. Danieli aarĂŽ mwana wa baĂŽrĂŽ wa Daudi
1Chronicles3:2 Abusalomu nĂŽwe waarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa bathatĂť wa Daudi. Ng'ina aarĂŽ Maaka mwarĂŽ wa Talimai. Talimai nĂŽwe waarĂŽ mĂťnene wa Geshuri. Adonija aarĂŽ mwana wa bana wa Daudi
1Chronicles3:3 Shefatia nĂŽwe waarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa bataano wa Daudi
1Chronicles3:4 Bau bo batantatĂť nĂŽbo aana barĂŽa Daudi agĂŽĂŽre nabo ĂŽgiita rĂŽa mĂŽaka mĂťgwanja na nusu rĂŽrĂŽa akarĂŽre akĂŽathanaga arĂŽ ntĂťĂťreene ya Heburoni. NingĂŽ Daudi nĂŽ aathanĂŽre arĂŽ Jerusalemu mĂŽaka mĂŽrongo ĂŽthatĂť na ĂŽthatĂť.

1Chronicles3:19 Ataana ba Pedaia baarĂŽ Zerubabeli na Shimei. Nabo ataana ba Zerubabeli baarĂŽ Meshulamu na Hanania. Zerubabeli nĂŽ aarĂŽ na mwarĂŽ weetagwa Shelomithi.

1Chronicles4:8 Kozi nĂŽwe waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Anubu na Zobeba. Kozi nĂŽwe waarĂŽ kĂŽĂťjĂťjĂť kĂŽa mĂŽĂŽrĂŽga ĂŽrĂŽa yaaumĂŽre kĂŽrĂŽ Ahariheli. Harumu nĂŽwe waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Ahariheli.

1Chronicles4:12 Eshitoni aarĂŽ na ataana bathatĂť
1Chronicles4:13 Kenazi nĂŽ aarĂŽ na ataana baĂŽrĂŽ. Nabo baarĂŽ Othinieli na Seraia. Othinieli aarĂŽ na ataana baĂŽrĂŽ
1Chronicles4:14 Meonothai aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Ofura. Seraia aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Joabu ĂťrĂŽa waatĂťĂťraga KĂŽguuruune gĂŽa atea. GĂŽetĂŽrwe Ăťu nĂŽĂťntĂť antĂť barĂŽa baatĂťĂťraga ku baarĂŽ atea.
1Chronicles4:15 Kalebu mĂťtaana wa Jefune aarĂŽ na ataana bathatĂť: Iru na Ela na Naamu. Ela nĂŽwe waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Kenazi.
1Chronicles4:16 Jehaleleli aarĂŽ na ataana bana
1Chronicles4:17 Ezra aarĂŽ na ataana bana
1Chronicles4:18 Meredi nĂŽ aagĂťrĂŽte mĂťka wa kuuma Juda. Nawe mĂťka Ăťu aramĂťciarĂŽra ataana bathatĂť. Nabo baarĂŽ Jeredi na Heberi na Jekuthieli. Jeredi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Gedori nawe Heberi ĂŽthe wa Soko na Jekuthieli aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Zanoa.
1Chronicles4:19 Hodia aagĂťrĂŽte mwarĂŽ wa ng'ina wa Nahamu. MwekĂťrĂť Ăťu aramĂťciarĂŽra aana baĂŽrĂŽ. Nabo baarĂŽ Keila na Eshitemoa. Keila nĂŽwe kĂŽĂťjĂťjĂť kĂŽa antĂť ba Garimu na Eshitemoa nĂŽwe kĂŽĂťjĂťjĂť kĂŽa antĂť ba Maakathi.
1Chronicles4:20 Shimoni aarĂŽ na ataana bana
1Chronicles4:21 MĂťtaana wa Juda
1Chronicles4:22 KĂťringana na ngono cia karaaja
1Chronicles4:23 Bau nĂŽbo baarĂŽ na Ăťtea bwa kĂťthithia into bia yĂťmba na nĂŽ baatumĂŽkagĂŽra mĂťnene. Nabo baatĂťĂťraga Netaimu na Gedera.
1Chronicles4:24 Simioni aarĂŽ na ataana bataano
1Chronicles4:25 Shaulu aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Shalumu
1Chronicles4:26 Mishima aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Hamueli
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei aarĂŽ na ataana ĂŽkĂťmi na bataantatĂť na aarĂŽ bataantatĂť

1Chronicles4:29 na Biliha na Ezemu na Toladi
1Chronicles4:30 na Bethueli na Horima na Zikilagi

1Chronicles4:32 NingĂŽ nĂŽ baatwĂŽre tĂťtĂťĂťreene tĂťtaano tĂťrĂŽa tweetagwa Etamu na Aini na Rimoni na Tokeni na Ashani.
1Chronicles4:33 NĂŽ baatwĂŽre ntĂťĂťreene irĂŽa ciaathiĂťrukĂŽrĂŽte gĂťntĂť kĂťĂť mwanka bwa rĂťgĂťrĂť rwa ntĂťĂťra ya Baalathi. NĂŽ baandĂŽkaga mariĂŽtwa ja antĂť ba mĂŽĂŽrĂŽga yaao na gĂťntĂť kĂťrĂŽa baatĂťĂťraga.
1Chronicles4:34 Jaja nĂŽjo mariĂŽtwa ja atongeeria ba mĂŽciĂŽ yaao: Meshobabu
1Chronicles4:35 Joeli
1Chronicles4:36 NingĂŽ Elioenai
1Chronicles4:37 Sisa mĂťtaana wa Shifi. Shifi aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Aloni. Nawe Aloni aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Jedaia. Jedaia aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Shimuri. Shimuri aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Shemaia.
1Chronicles4:38 AntĂť bau bagwetwa nĂŽbo baarĂŽ atongeeria ba mĂŽciĂŽ yaao. Nabo nĂŽ bathegeere mono.
1Chronicles4:39 Nabo bareeta bwa rĂťgĂťrĂť akuĂŽ na Gedori. BangĂŽ bareeta rĂťteere rwa bwa gaiti rwa kĂŽguuru bagĂŽcwaga gĂťntĂť gwa kĂťrĂŽĂŽthia.
1Chronicles4:40 NthĂŽ ĂŽĂŽu yaarĂŽ ĂŽnoru na gĂťntĂť gĂťkwega gwa kĂťrĂŽĂŽthia. Nayo yaarĂŽ ĂŽĂŽmbariĂŽ na yaarĂŽ thĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na Ăťkiri. AntĂť barĂŽa batĂťĂťraga gĂťntĂť kĂťu mbere baarĂŽ ba rĂťrĂŽĂŽjo rwa Hamu.
1Chronicles4:41 AntĂť ba mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Simioni beetĂŽre gĂťntĂť kĂťu rĂŽrĂŽa Hezekia aarĂŽ mĂťnene wa Juda. BagwĂŽta baraithĂťkĂŽra antĂť ba Hamu na Meunimu
1Chronicles4:42 AntĂť magana jataano ba mwĂŽrĂŽga o jĂťu jwa Simioni nĂŽ beetĂŽre bwa gaiti kĂťu Edomu batongeeretue nĂŽ atongeeria baba: Pelatia na Nearia na Refaia na Uzieli. Atongeeria bau baarĂŽ ataana ba Ishi.
1Chronicles4:43 Nabo nĂŽ baathirĂŽrie antĂť ba Amaleki barĂŽa boonokeete kuuma ndweene na baatwĂŽre gĂťntĂť kĂťu. TontĂť bĂťĂť

1Chronicles5:25 ĂndĂŽ nĂŽ beeĂŽĂŽrie MĂťrungu wa biĂťjĂťjĂť biaao nĂŽĂťntĂť bwa kĂťthaathayia mĂŽrungu ya mĂŽng'uanano ĂŽrĂŽa antĂť ba nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ĂŽĂŽu baathaathagia barĂŽa MĂťrungu aarĂŽ akwĂŽnga kuuma ku.
1Chronicles5:26 KĂŽĂť nĂŽkĂŽo gĂŽaatĂťmĂŽre MĂťrungu aatumĂŽra mĂťnene wa AsĂŽria ĂťrĂŽa weetagwa Puli kana na riĂŽtwa rĂŽngĂŽ Tigilathi Pileseri aĂŽthĂťkĂŽra nchiarwa cia Rubeni na cia Manase na cia Gadi. 1Chronicles6:4 Eleazari aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Fineasi
1Chronicles6:5 Abishua aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Buki. Buki aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Uzzi.

1Chronicles6:32 AntĂť bau nobo baainaga mbere ya ĂŽema rĂŽa MWATHANI rĂŽa gĂťtirimanĂŽra mbere ya Solomoni aaka kĂŽĂťrĂť kĂťu Jerusalemu. O aini baainaga ĂŽgiita rĂŽaao rĂŽaakinya.
1Chronicles6:33 RĂťrĂŽĂŽjo rwa aini rwaarĂŽ rĂťrĂť: Kohathi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Hemani na Hemani nĂŽwe waarĂŽ mĂťtongeeria wa aini ba mbere. Hemani aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Joeli
1Chronicles6:34 Samueli aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Elikana
1Chronicles6:35 Toa aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Zufu na Zufu aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Elikana. Elikana aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Mahathi. Mahathi aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Amasai.
1Chronicles6:36 Amasai aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Elikana. Nawe Elikana aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Joeli. Joeli aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Azaria. Nawe Azaria aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Zefania.
1Chronicles6:37 Zefania aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Tahathi. Nawe Tahathi aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Asiri. Asiri aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Ebiasafu. Ebiasafu aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Kora.
1Chronicles6:38 Kora aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Izihari. Izihari aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Kohathi. Nawe Kohathi aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Lawi. Lawi aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Israeli.
1Chronicles6:39 Asafu nĂŽwe waarĂŽ mĂťtongeeria wa gĂŽkundi kĂŽa aini kĂŽa biĂŽrĂŽ. Naru rĂťrĂŽĂŽjo rwaawe nĂŽru rĂťrĂť: Asafu aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Berekia
1Chronicles6:40 Shimea aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Mikaeli. Nawe Mikaeli aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Baaseia. Baaseia aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Malikija
1Chronicles6:41 Malikija aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Ethini. Ethini aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Zera. Zera aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Adaia.
1Chronicles6:42 Adaia aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Ethani. Ethani aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Zima
1Chronicles6:43 Shimei aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Jahathi. Nawe Jahathi aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Gerishoni. Gerishoni aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Lawi.
1Chronicles6:44 GĂŽkundi kĂŽa aini kĂŽa bithatĂť gĂŽaatongagĂŽĂŽrua nĂŽ Ethani. Ethani aarĂŽ wa kuuma mwĂŽrĂŽgeene jwa Merari. Ethani aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Keshi. Keshi aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Abudi. Nawe Abudi aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Maluki.
1Chronicles6:45 Maluki aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Hashabia. Hashabia aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Amazia. Amazia aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Hilikia.
1Chronicles6:46 Hilikia aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Amuzi. Amuzi aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Bani. Nawe Bani aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Shemeri.
1Chronicles6:47 Shemeri aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Mahili. Nawe Mahili aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Mushi. Mushi aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Merari. Nawe Merari aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Lawi.
1Chronicles6:48 AntĂť bangĂŽ ba mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Lawi nĂŽ baathuurĂŽrwe nĂŽkenda baritaga ngĂťgĂŽ cionthe irĂŽa ciaritagwa ĂŽemeene rĂŽa gĂťtirimanĂŽra.
1Chronicles6:49 Aaroni na nchiarwa ciaawe nĂŽbo baritaga igongwana birĂŽa bia gwakĂŽĂŽria na bia ubaani au kĂŽritĂŽroone kĂŽa igongwana kĂŽrĂŽa kĂŽtheru mono. NingĂŽ bakarita ngĂťgĂŽ cionthe irĂŽa ciaaritagĂŽrwa antĂť arĂŽa atheru buru. Bakarita kĂŽgongwana gĂŽa kĂťthiria meeyia ja Aisraeli kĂťringana na ĂťrĂŽa Musa nthĂťĂťmba ya MĂťrungu aabeeraga.
1Chronicles6:50 RĂťrĂŽĂŽjo rwa Aaroni rwaarĂŽ rĂťrĂť: Aaroni aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Eleazari. Eleazari aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Fineasi. Fineasi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Abishua.
1Chronicles6:51 Abishua aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Buki. Buki aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Uzzi. Uzzi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Zerahia. Zeraia aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Meraiothi.
1Chronicles6:52 Meraiothi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Amaria. Nawe Amaria aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Ahitubu.
1Chronicles6:53 Ahitubu aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Zadoki. Nawe Zadoki aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Ahimaazi.
1Chronicles6:54 GĂťntĂť kĂťrĂŽa nchiarwa cia Aaroni wa rĂťrĂŽĂŽjo rwa Kohathi ciaatĂťĂťraga nĂŽ nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ĂŽrĂŽa Alawi baagaĂŽrĂŽĂŽrwe.
1Chronicles6:55 BaagaĂŽrĂŽĂŽrwe Heburoni kĂťu nthĂŽgĂťrĂťĂťne ya Juda na bĂťĂťrĂŽ iria ciaathiĂťrĂťkĂŽrĂŽte gĂťntĂť kĂťu.
1Chronicles6:56 ĂndĂŽ miuunda na tĂťtĂťĂťra tĂťrĂŽa twathiĂťrĂťkĂŽrĂŽte ntĂťĂťra ya Heburoni twaagaĂŽrĂŽĂŽrwe Kalebu mĂťtaana wa Jefune.
1Chronicles6:57 Ataana ba Aaroni baagaĂŽrĂŽĂŽrwe ntĂťĂťra irĂŽa muntĂť aamatĂťkaga gwiciitha. Nacio ciaarĂŽ Heburoni na Libuna amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ ciaayo. NĂŽ bagaĂŽĂŽrwe Jatiri na Eshitemoa amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ ciaayo.
1Chronicles6:58 NingĂŽ baragaĂŽrwa ntĂťĂťra ya Hileni na Debiri amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ ciaacio.
1Chronicles6:59 BaragaĂŽrwa ntĂťĂťra ya Ashani na ya Bethishemeshi amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ ciaacio.
1Chronicles6:60 NingĂŽ nĂŽ baagaĂŽrĂŽĂŽrwe ntĂťĂťra ingĂŽ gĂťntĂť kĂťrĂŽa mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Benjamini jwaagaĂŽri. Nacio nĂŽ Geba na Alemethi na Anathothi amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ ciaacio. NtĂťĂťreene iu nĂŽku nchiarwa cia Lawi ciaatĂťĂťraga. Nacio ciaarĂŽ ntĂťĂťra ĂŽkĂťmi na ithatĂť.
1Chronicles6:61 Nchiarwa ingĂŽ cia Kohathi nĂŽ ciaagaĂŽrĂŽĂŽrwe ntĂťĂťra ĂŽkĂťmi rĂťteere rwa rĂťgĂťrĂť ya gĂťntĂť kĂťrĂŽa kwagaĂŽri mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Manase.
1Chronicles6:62 AntĂť ba mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Gerishoni nĂŽ baagaĂŽrĂŽĂŽrwe ntĂťĂťra ĂŽkĂťmi na ithatĂť kĂťringana na mĂŽciĂŽ yaao. BaagaĂŽrĂŽĂŽrwe cio kuuma mwĂŽrĂŽgeene jwa Isakari na jwa Asheri na jwa Nafutali na jwa Manase kĂťu Bashani.
1Chronicles6:63 AntĂť ba mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Merari nĂŽ baagaĂŽrĂŽĂŽrwe ntĂťĂťra ĂŽkĂťmi na ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ kĂťringana na mĂŽciĂŽ yaao. BaagaĂŽrĂŽĂŽrwe cio kuuma mwĂŽrĂŽgeene jwa Rubeni na jwa Gadi na jwa Zebuloni.
1Chronicles6:64 Ău nĂŽu antĂť ba Israeli baagaĂŽre nchiarwa cia Lawi ntĂťĂťra na bĂťĂťrĂŽ irĂŽa ciaathiĂťrĂťkĂŽrĂŽte ntĂťĂťra iu.
1Chronicles6:65 NingĂŽ nĂŽ baagaĂŽĂŽrwe ntĂťĂťra ingĂŽ irĂŽa igweti au ĂŽgĂťrĂť kuuma mwĂŽrĂŽgeene jwa Juda na jwa Simioni na jwa Benjamini. NtĂťĂťra iu baagaĂŽĂŽrwe cio kĂťringana na kuura irĂŽa cionanĂŽrie naarĂŽa bakagaĂŽrwa.
1Chronicles6:66 MĂŽciĂŽ ĂŽngĂŽ ya Kohathi nĂŽ yaagaĂŽĂŽrwe ntĂťĂťra ingĂŽ amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ yaacio kuuma nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ĂŽrĂŽa mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Efuraimu jwaagaĂŽri.
1Chronicles6:67 BaragaĂŽrwa ntĂťĂťra irĂŽa muntĂť aamatĂťkaga gwiciitha. Nacio nĂŽ Shekemu kĂťu nthĂŽgĂťrĂťĂťne ya IrĂŽma ya Efuraimu. NingĂŽ baragaĂŽrwa ntĂťĂťra ya Gezeri amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ irĂŽa ciaathiĂťrĂťkĂŽrĂŽte ntĂťĂťra iu.
1Chronicles6:68 NingĂŽ nĂŽ baagaĂŽĂŽrwe ntĂťĂťra ya Jokimeamu na Bethihoroni amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ irĂŽa ciaathiĂťrĂťkĂŽrĂŽte.
1Chronicles6:69 BaagaĂŽĂŽrwe ntĂťĂťra ya Aijaloni na ya Gathirimoni amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ irĂŽa ciaaithiĂťrĂťkĂŽrĂŽte.
1Chronicles6:70 NingĂŽ kuuma Manase ya bwa rĂťgĂťrĂť
1Chronicles6:71 Nacio nchiarwa cia mĂŽciĂŽ ya Gerishoni iragaĂŽrwa ntĂťĂťra cia Golani kĂťu Bashani na ntĂťĂťra ya Ashitarothi amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ ciaacio. NtĂťĂťra iu ciaarĂŽ kĂťu Manase ya gaiti.
1Chronicles6:72 Ndene ya mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Isakari nchiarwa cia Gerishoni iragaĂŽrwa ntĂťĂťra ya Kedeshi na ya Daberathi amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ ciaacio.
1Chronicles6:73 Baracoka baragaĂŽrwa ntĂťĂťra ya Ramothi na ya Anemu amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ ciaacio.
1Chronicles6:74 Ndene ya mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Asheri baragaĂŽrwa ntĂťĂťra ya Mashari na ya Abidoni amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ ciaacio.
1Chronicles6:75 NingĂŽ baragaĂŽrwa ntĂťĂťra ya Hukooki na ya Rehobu amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ ciaacio.
1Chronicles6:76 Ndeene ya mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Nafutali
1Chronicles6:77 AntĂť ba mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Merari barĂŽa batigeere baagaĂŽĂŽrwe ntĂťĂťra irĂŽa ciaarĂŽ mwĂŽrĂŽgeene jwa Zebuloni. Nacio nĂŽ Rimono na Tabori amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ ciaacio.
1Chronicles6:78 NingĂŽ nĂŽ baagaĂŽĂŽrwe ntĂťĂťra ingĂŽ kuuma mwĂŽrĂŽgeene jwa Rubeni
1Chronicles6:79 NingĂŽ baragaĂŽrwa ntĂťĂťra ya Kedemothi na ya Mefaathi amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ ciaacio.
1Chronicles6:80 MwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Gadi
1Chronicles6:81 NingĂŽ baragaĂŽrwa ntĂťĂťra ya Heshiboni na ya Jazeri amwe na bĂťĂťrĂŽ ciaacio.
1Chronicles7:1 Isakari aarĂŽ na ataana bana. Nabo nĂŽ Tola na Pua na Jashubu na Shimuroni.
1Chronicles7:2 Tola aarĂŽ na ataana batantatĂť. Nabo nĂŽ Uzzi na Refaia na Jerieli na Jahimai na Ibisamu na Shemueli. Bau nĂŽbo baarĂŽ atongeeria ba mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Tola na baarĂŽ nchamba cia ndwaa. RĂŽrĂŽa Daudi aathanaga
1Chronicles7:3 Uzzi aarĂŽ na mĂťtaana Ăťmwe weetagwa Izirahia. Nawe Izirahia aarĂŽ na ataana baba: Mikaeli na Obadia na Joeli na Ishia. Bau baarĂŽ atongeeria ba mĂŽciĂŽ yaao.
1Chronicles7:4 Nabo nĂŽ baagĂťrĂŽte aka babaingĂŽ mwanka barathegea mono. TontĂť bĂťĂť
1Chronicles7:5 Nchiarwa cionthe cia mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Isakari ciaarĂŽ na antĂť barĂŽa barĂŽngĂŽĂŽta ndweene ngiri mĂŽrongo ĂŽnaana na mĂťgwanja (87
1Chronicles7:6 Ataana ba Benjamini baarĂŽ bathatĂť. Nabo nĂŽ Bela na Bekeri na Jadieli.
1Chronicles7:7 Bela aarĂŽ na ataana bataano. Nabo nĂŽ Eziboni na Uzzi na Uzieli na Jerimothi na Iri. Bau nĂŽbo baarĂŽ atongeeria ba mĂŽciĂŽ yaao na baarĂŽ nchamba cia ndwaa. KĂťringana na ĂťrĂŽa kwaandĂŽki maukuune ja ndĂťrĂŽĂŽjo baarĂŽ antĂť ngiri mĂŽrongo ĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na ijĂŽĂŽrĂŽ na mĂŽrongo ĂŽthatĂť na bana (22
1Chronicles7:8 Bekeri aarĂŽ na ataana kenda. Nabo nĂŽ Zemira na Joashi na Eliezeri na Elioenai na Omuri na Jeremothi na Abija na Anathothi na Alemethi.
1Chronicles7:9 KĂťringana na ĂťrĂŽa kwaandĂŽki maukuune ja ndĂťrĂŽĂŽjo
1Chronicles7:10 Jediaeli aarĂŽ na mĂťtaana Ăťmwe weetagwa Bilihani. Bilihani aarĂŽ na ataana mĂťgwanja. Nabo nĂŽ Jeushi na Benjamini na Ehudi na Kenaana na Zethani na Tarishishi na Aishahari.
1Chronicles7:11 Bau bonthe nĂŽbo baarĂŽ ataana ba Jadieli. BaarĂŽ atongeeria ba mĂŽciĂŽ yaao na baarĂŽ na nchamba cia ndwaa ngiri ĂŽkĂťmi na mĂťgwanja na magana jaĂŽrĂŽ (17
1Chronicles7:12 Shupimu na Hupimu baarĂŽ ataana ba Iri. Nawe Hushimu aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Aheri.
1Chronicles7:13 Nafutali aarĂŽ na ataana bana. Nabo nĂŽ Jahizieli na Guni na Jezeri na Shalumu. Bau bo bana baaciari nĂŽ Biliha.
1Chronicles7:14 MĂťka wa gwĂŽka wa Manase ĂťrĂŽa aumĂŽre nawe Aramu
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri nĂŽ aagĂťranĂŽre Hupimu na Shupimu. MwarĂŽ wa ng'ina wa Makiri eetagwa Maaka. MĂťtaana wa Makiri ĂťngĂŽ eetagwa Zelofehadi. Nawe Zelofehadi aarĂŽ na aarĂŽ akĂŽ.
1Chronicles7:16 Makiri nĂŽ aagĂťrĂŽre mĂťka weetagwa Maaka. Nawe aramĂťciarĂŽra ataana baĂŽrĂŽ. Nabo nĂŽ Pereshi na Shereshi. Pereshi nawe aarĂŽ na ataana baĂŽrĂŽ: Ulamu na Rekemu.
1Chronicles7:17 Ulamu aarĂŽ na mĂťtaana weetagwa Bedani. Bau nĂŽbo baarĂŽ nchiarwa cia Gileadi mĂťtaana wa Makiri. Makiri ĂťrĂŽa waarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Manase.
1Chronicles7:18 MwarĂŽ wa ng'ina wa Gileadi ĂťrĂŽa weetagwa Hamolekethi aarĂŽ na ataana bathatĂť. Nabo nĂŽ Ishodi na Abiezeri na Mahala.
1Chronicles7:19 Nawe Shemida aarĂŽ na ataana bana. Nabo nĂŽ Ahiani na Shekemu na Liki na Aniamu.
1Chronicles7:20 Baba nĂŽbo baarĂŽ nchiarwa cia Efuraimu. Efuraimu aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Shuthela. Shuthela aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Beredi. Nawe Beredi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Tahathi. Tahathi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Eleada. Eleada aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Tahathi.
1Chronicles7:21 Tahathi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Zabadi. Zabadi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Shuthela. Efuraimu nĂŽ aarĂŽ na ataana bangĂŽ baĂŽrĂŽ. Nabo nĂŽ Ezeri na Eleadi barĂŽa booragĂŽrwe bagwĂŽta kwiyĂŽa ng'ombe cia antĂť ba Gathi.
1Chronicles7:22 Ăthe waao Efuraimu
1Chronicles7:23 Efuraimu arathengeera mĂťka waawe
1Chronicles7:24 MwarĂŽ wa Efuraimu eetagwa Sheera nawe nĂŽwe waakithĂŽrie ntĂťĂťra ya Bethihoroni ĂŽrĂŽa ĂŽrĂŽ bwa rĂťgĂťrĂť na ĂŽrĂŽa ĂŽrĂŽ bwa gaiti. NingĂŽ nĂŽ aakĂŽre ntĂťĂťra ya Uzeni-sheera.
1Chronicles7:25 Efuraimu nĂŽ aarĂŽ na mĂťtaana ĂťngĂŽ weetagwa Refa. Refa aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Reshefu. Reshefu aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Tela. Nawe Tela aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Tahani.
1Chronicles7:26 Tahani aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Ladani. Ladani aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Amihudi. Nawe Amihudi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Elishama.
1Chronicles7:27 Elishama aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Nuni. Nawe Nuni aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Joshua.
1Chronicles7:28 Nchiarwa iu cia Efuraimu ciatĂťĂťraga Betheli na ntĂťĂťra irĂŽa ciaarĂŽ akuĂŽ nayo. NingĂŽ bwa gaiti bakinya Naarani na bwa rĂťgĂťrĂť bakinya Gezeri; na ntĂťĂťra irĂŽa ciaarĂŽ akuĂŽ nayo. NĂŽ baatĂťĂťraga kinya ntĂťĂťreene cia Shekemu na Aya
1Chronicles7:29 NingĂŽ nchiarwa cia Efuraimu ciatĂťĂťraga bankeene na mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Manase kĂťu Bethisheani na Taanaki na Megido na Dori na ntĂťĂťra irĂŽa ciaarĂŽ akuĂŽ nacio. KĂťu nĂŽku nchiarwa cia Josefu mĂťtaana wa Jakubu ciaatĂťĂťraga.
1Chronicles7:30 Asheri aarĂŽ na ataana bana. Nabo nĂŽ Imina na Ishiva na Ishivi na Beria. NingĂŽ nĂŽ aarĂŽ na mwarĂŽ weetagwa Sera.
1Chronicles7:31 Beria aarĂŽ na ataana baĂŽrĂŽ. Nabo nĂŽ Heberi na Malikieli. Melikieli nĂŽwe waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Birizaithi.
1Chronicles7:32 Heberi nawe aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Jafileti na Shomeri na Hothamu. NingĂŽ nĂŽ aarĂŽ na mwarĂŽ weetagwa Shua.
1Chronicles7:33 Jafileti nawe aarĂŽ na ataana bathatĂť. Nabo nĂŽ Pasaki na Bimuhali na Ashivathi.
1Chronicles7:34 MĂťtaana wa ng'ina wa Jafileti ĂťrĂŽa weetagwa Shemeri aarĂŽ na ataana bathatĂť. Nabo nĂŽ Rohiga na Huba na Aramu.
1Chronicles7:35 MĂťtaana wa ng'ina wa Shemeri ĂťrĂŽa weetagwa Helemu nawe aarĂŽ na ataana bana. Nabo nĂŽ Zofa na Imuna na Sheleshi na Amali.
1Chronicles7:36 Ataana ba Zofa baarĂŽ Sua na Harinefa na Shuali na Beri na Imura
1Chronicles7:37 na Bezeri na Hodi na Shama na Shilisha na Ithirani na Beera.
1Chronicles7:38 Ataana ba Jetheri baarĂŽ Jefune na Pisipa na Ara.
1Chronicles7:39 Nabo ataana ba Ula baarĂŽ Ara na Hanieli na Rizia.
1Chronicles7:40 Bau bonthe nĂŽbo baarĂŽ nchiarwa cia Asheri. Nabo baarĂŽ atongeeria ba mĂŽciĂŽ yaao na nchamba cia ndwaa. NingĂŽ nĂŽbo baarĂŽ anene ba bangĂŽ. KĂťringana na maandĂŽko ja ndĂťrĂŽĂŽjo

1Chronicles8:5 na Gera na Shefufani na Huramu.

1Chronicles8:7 Naamani na Ahija na Gera. Gera nĂŽwe waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Uza na Ahihudi

1Chronicles8:12 Elipaali aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa ataana baba: Eberi na Mishamu na Shemedi. Shemedi nĂŽwe waakĂŽre ntĂťĂťra cia Ono na Lodi
1Chronicles8:13 NingĂŽ Elipaali nĂŽ aarĂŽ na ataana bangĂŽ beetagwa Beria na Shema. (Nabo baarĂŽ atongeeria ba mĂŽciĂŽ yaao. BaatwĂŽre Aijaloni na nĂŽbo beengĂŽre antĂť barĂŽa batĂťĂťraga ntĂťĂťreene ya Gathi).

1Chronicles8:36 Ahazi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Jehoada. Nawe Jehoada aarĂŽ na ataana bathatĂť: nabo nĂŽ Alemethi na Azimavethi na Zimuri. Zimuri nĂŽwe waarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Moza.
1Chronicles8:37 Moza aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Binea

1Chronicles8:40 Ataana ba Ulamu nabo baarĂŽ nchamba cia ndwaa irĂŽa ciaaijĂŽ kĂťratha na mĂŽgwĂŽ mono. Nawe Ulamu aarĂŽ na ataana na boojĂťwe ĂŽgana rĂŽa mĂŽrongo ĂŽtaano (150). Baba bonthe bagwetwa baarĂŽ ba mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Benjamini.
1Chronicles9:1 Nabo antĂť ba Israeli nĂŽ baandĂŽkĂŽrwe kĂťringana na ndĂťrĂŽĂŽjo ciaao Yukuune rĂŽa Anene ba Israeli. AntĂť ba nthĂŽgĂťrĂť ya Juda nĂŽ baarĂŽ bagĂťtawa baikua kĂŽthamĂŽrioone kĂťu Babiloni nĂŽĂťntĂť bwa kwĂŽthĂŽrwa batĂŽ eetĂŽkua kĂŽrĂŽ MĂťrungu waao.
1Chronicles9:2 Nabo antĂť barĂŽa baarĂŽ ba mbere gĂťcoka kĂťrĂŽa baakaraga ntĂťĂťreene ciaao baarĂŽ Aisraeli bamwe na athĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu na Alawi
1Chronicles9:3 AntĂť bamwe ba mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Juda
1Chronicles9:4 KwarĂŽ na Uthai mĂťtaana wa Amihudi. Amihudi aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Omuri
1Chronicles9:5 Shiloni aarĂŽ na mĂťtaana wa kĂŽranga weetagwa Asaia. Asaia nĂŽ aarĂŽ na ataana baawe.
1Chronicles9:6 Ămwe wa ataana ba Zera eetagwa Jeueli. Jeueli na antĂť ba mĂťciĂŽ jwaao baarĂŽ antĂť magana jatantatĂť ja mĂŽrongo kenda (690).
1Chronicles9:7 Kuuma mwĂŽrĂŽgeene jwa Benjamini nĂŽ kwaarĂŽ na muntĂť weetagwa Salu. Salu aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Meshulamu. Meshulamu aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Hodavia
1Chronicles9:8 Ibineia aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Jerohamu. Ela aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Uzzi. Uzzi aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Mikiri. Meshulamu aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Shefatia. Shefatia aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Reueli
1Chronicles9:9 Bau bonthe baandĂŽki kĂťringana na ndĂťrĂŽĂŽjo ciaao baarĂŽ atongeeria ba mĂŽciĂŽ yaao. Nabo baarĂŽ magana kenda ja mĂŽrongo ĂŽtaano na bataantatĂť (956).
1Chronicles9:10 Baba baarĂŽ athĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu: Jedaia na Jehoiaribu na Jakini
1Chronicles9:11 na Azaria
1Chronicles9:12 BangĂŽ nĂŽ Adaia mĂťtaana wa Jerohamu. Jerohamu aarĂŽ mĂťtaana Pashuri
1Chronicles9:13 NdĂťgĂť cia athĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu irĂŽa ciaarĂŽ atongeeria ba mĂŽciĂŽ yaao baarĂŽ antĂť ngiri ĂŽmwe na magana mĂťgwanja ja mĂŽrongo ĂŽtaantatĂť (1
1Chronicles9:14 NingĂŽ nĂŽ kwaarĂŽ na Alawi baba: Shemaia mĂťtaana wa Hashubu. Hashubu aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Azirikamu. Azirikamu aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Hashabia. Hashabia aarĂŽ Ăťmwe wa ataana ba Merari.
1Chronicles9:15 NĂŽ kwaarĂŽ na Bakibakari na Hereshi na Galali na Matania mĂťtaana wa Mika. Mika aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Zikiri. Nawe Zikiri aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Asafu.
1Chronicles9:16 NingĂŽ nĂŽ kwaarĂŽ na Obadia mĂťtaana wa Shemaia. Shemaia aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Galali. Galali aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Jeduthuni. Berekia aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Asa. Asa aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Elikana ĂťrĂŽa watĂťĂťraga ntĂťĂťreene cia antĂť ba Netofa.
1Chronicles9:17 AntĂť baba nĂŽbo bakaragia mĂŽari ya kĂŽĂťrĂť: Shalumu na Akubu na Talimoni na Ahimani. Shalumu nĂŽwe waarĂŽ mĂťtongeeria waao.
1Chronicles9:18 NĂŽbo baakaragia mpingĂŽro ya gĂŽkaro kĂŽa mĂťnene irĂŽa yaarĂŽ bwa gaiti. NĂŽbo baarĂŽ akaria ba mpingĂŽro cia kambĂŽ ya Alawi.
1Chronicles9:19 Shalumu aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Kore. Kore aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Abiasafu. Abiasafu aarĂŽ mĂťtaana wa Kora. Bau amwe na ndĂťgĂť ciaao baarĂŽ atongeeria ba mĂŽciĂŽ yaao. NingĂŽ nĂŽbo baamenyagĂŽĂŽra kĂŽarago kĂŽa ĂŽema rĂŽa MWATHANI rĂŽa gĂťtirimanĂŽra o ta ĂťrĂŽa biĂťjĂťjĂť biaao biaamenyagĂŽĂŽra. NingĂŽ nĂŽbo baaritaga ngĂťgĂŽ ĂŽemeene rĂŽa gĂťtirimanĂŽra amwe na gĂťkaria mpingĂŽro yaarĂŽo.
1Chronicles9:20 Mbereene Fineasi mĂťtaana wa Eleazari nĂŽwe waarĂŽ mĂťtongeeria waao. MWATHANI nĂŽ aarĂŽ amwe nawe.
1Chronicles9:21 Zekaria mĂťtaana wa Meshelemia nĂŽwe waakaragia mpingĂŽro ya ĂŽema rĂŽa gĂťtirimanĂŽra.
1Chronicles9:22 BarĂŽa bonthe bathuuri ba gĂťkaria mpingĂŽro baarĂŽ magana jaĂŽrĂŽ ja ĂŽkĂťmi na baĂŽrĂŽ (212). NĂŽ baandĂŽkithĂŽtue kĂťringana na ndĂŽĂŽjo ciaao kĂťu ntĂťĂťreene ciaao. Daudi na Samueli ĂťrĂŽa waarĂŽ kĂŽroria nĂŽbo baanenkeere antĂť bau ngĂťgĂŽ.
1Chronicles9:23 TontĂť bĂťĂť
1Chronicles9:24 NĂŽ kwaarĂŽ na mpingĂŽro nteere cio inya: bwa-gaiti
1Chronicles9:25 AntĂť ba ndĂťgĂť cia akaria bau barĂŽa baakaragia ntĂťĂťreene nĂŽ beetaga kĂťbateethia gĂťkaria ntukĂť ya mĂťgwanja
1Chronicles9:26 NĂŽ kwaarĂŽ na akaria ba mpingĂŽro barĂŽa anene
1Chronicles9:27 Nabo baatĂťĂťraga au akuĂŽ na kĂŽĂťrĂť tontĂť yaarĂŽ ngĂťgĂŽ yaao gĂťkaria na kĂťrugĂťra mĂŽari yaakĂŽo o rĂťkĂŽĂŽrĂŽ o rĂťkĂŽĂŽrĂŽ.
1Chronicles9:28 Alawi bangĂŽ baamenyagĂŽĂŽra into birĂŽa biatumagĂŽrwa rĂŽrĂŽa antĂť baathaathagia MĂťrungu. NĂŽbo baabitaraga bigĂŽĂŽta gĂťtumĂŽrwa na bakabitara kaĂŽrĂŽ bigĂŽcokua.
1Chronicles9:29 BangĂŽ baamenyagĂŽĂŽra itĂŽ na meetha irĂŽa ciaatumagĂŽrwa kĂŽĂťrĂťĂťne. NingĂŽ bakamenyeera into bionthe birĂŽa bitheru biaatumagĂŽrwa kĂŽĂťrĂťĂťne
1Chronicles9:30 ĂndĂŽ ngĂťgĂŽ ya gĂťtukania into biu bia gwĂŽkĂŽra irio mĂťchemo yaarĂŽ ya athĂŽnjĂŽri-MĂťrungu.
1Chronicles9:31 Matithia aarĂŽ mwana wa kĂŽranga wa Shalumu kuuma mwĂŽrĂŽgeene jwa Kora. NĂŽwe waarĂŽ mĂťtongeeria wa antĂť barĂŽa baakaandaga mĂŽgaate ya gĂťtumĂŽrwa kĂŽĂťrĂťĂťne.
1Chronicles9:32 AntĂť bangĂŽ ba mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Kohathi nĂŽbo baathithagia mĂŽgaate ĂŽrĂŽa yaatumagĂŽrwa kĂŽĂťrĂťĂťne mĂŽthenya ya sabatĂť.
1Chronicles9:33 AntĂť bamwe ba mĂŽciĂŽ ya Alawi baatĂťĂťraga tĂťnyomba tĂťmwe twa kĂŽĂťrĂť. Bo bataaritaga ngĂťgĂŽ ĂŽngĂŽ kĂŽĂťrĂťĂťne tiga kwina akĂŽ kĂťrĂŽ mĂťthenya kana ĂťtukĂť.
1Chronicles9:34 AntĂť bau bagwetwa nĂŽbo baarĂŽ atongeeria ba mĂŽciĂŽ ya Alawi o ta ĂťrĂŽa kwaandĂŽki maukuune ja ndĂťrĂŽĂŽjo. Nabo baatĂťĂťraga Jerusalemu.
1Chronicles9:35 Jeieli nĂŽwe waambĂŽrĂŽrie ntĂťĂťra ĂŽrĂŽa yeetagwa Gibeoni. NĂŽ aarĂŽ na mĂťka weetagwa Maaka.
1Chronicles9:36 MĂťtaana waawe wa kĂŽranga eetagwa Abidoni athingatwa nĂŽ Zuri na Kishi na Baali na Neri na Nadabu
1Chronicles9:37 na Gedori na Ahio na Zekaria na Mikilothi.
1Chronicles9:38 Mikilothi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Shimeamu. AntĂť bau baatĂťĂťraga akuĂŽ na antĂť ba ndĂťgĂť ciaao kĂťu Jerusalemu.
1Chronicles9:39 Neri aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Kishi
1Chronicles9:40 Jonathani aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Mefiboshethi. Nawe Mefiboshethi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Mika.
1Chronicles9:41 Nabo ataana ba Mika baarĂŽ: Pithoni na Meleki na Tahirea na Ahazi.
1Chronicles9:42 Ahazi aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Jara na Jara aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Alemethi
1Chronicles9:43 Moza aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Binea. Binea aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Refaia na Refaia aarĂŽ ĂŽthe wa Eleasa
1Chronicles9:44 Azeli aarĂŽ na ataana bataantatĂť. Nabo nĂŽ Azirikamu na Bocheru na Ishimaeli na Shearia na Obadia na Hanani.

1Chronicles12:1 AsikarĂŽ baba nĂŽbo baagwete Daudi mbaru rĂŽrĂŽa aarĂŽ Zikilagi amatĂťkĂŽte kuuma kĂŽrĂŽ mĂťnene SaĂťlĂť. Nabo baarĂŽ nchamba cia ndwaa irĂŽa ciamwigĂŽkĂŽte mono ĂŽgiita rĂŽa ndwaa.
1Chronicles12:2 Nchamba iu ciaarĂŽ cia mwĂŽrĂŽga jwa Benjamini o ta SaĂťlĂť. BaatumagĂŽra njara ya Ăťmotho o ta ya ĂťrĂŽo rĂŽrĂŽa baarathaga mĂŽgwĂŽ kana bakĂŽgera maiga na gĂŽkĂťtha.
1Chronicles12:3 BarĂŽa batongeeretie nĂŽ Ahiezeri na Joashi bo baĂŽrĂŽ baarĂŽ ataana ba Shemaa kuuma Gibea. AsikarĂŽ bangĂŽ ba gĂŽkundi kĂŽu baarĂŽ: Jezieli na Peleti ataana ba Azimavethi. NingĂŽ nĂŽ kwaarĂŽ na Beraka na Jehu wa kuuma Anathothi
1Chronicles12:4 Ishimaia kuuma Gibeoni ĂťrĂŽa waarĂŽ Ăťmwe wa nchamba irĂŽa mĂŽrongo ĂŽthatĂť na aarĂŽ mĂťtongeeria waacio
1Chronicles12:5 na Eluzai na Jerimothi na Bealia na Shemaria na Shefatia wa kuuma Harifu.
1Chronicles12:6 BangĂŽ baarĂŽ Elikana na Ishia na Azareli na Joezeri na Jashobeamu wa kuuma mwĂŽrĂŽgeene jwa Kora
